instructions: 将flour、dashi和eggs混合，加入切碎的cabbage和ginger拌匀。| 倒入热油锅中，将pork铺在表面。| 煎5分钟后小心翻面，再煎5分钟。(10 min) | 交叉淋上sauce和mayo。| 撒上bonito flakes和spring onion。

name: 烤鸡肉串
description: 涂抹甜味tare酱的炭烤鸡肉串。
pro_tip: 使用白炭（binchotan）增添正宗烟熏风味，最后点缀少许yuzu kosho提升口感层次。
ingredients: 600 g Chicken Thighs | 6 whole Spring Onion | 80 ml Soy Sauce | 80 ml Mirin | 60 ml Sake | 3 tbsp Sugar | 1 tbsp Sesame Seeds
instructions: 将soy、mirin、sake和sugar熬煮至浓稠的tare酱汁。(8 min) | 将chicken和spring onion切成3厘米段，交替穿入skewers。| 大火烧烤，边烤边涂抹tare，共烤12分钟。(12 min) | 撒上sesame，立即上桌。

name: 天妇罗蔬菜
description: 轻盈酥脆的裹粉蔬菜配天汁蘸料。
pro_tip: 使用冰苏打水以获得更好的蓬松感，并使用烟点更高的中性油，如葡萄籽油。
ingredients: 1 whole Courgette | 1 whole Sweet Potato | 1 whole Aubergine | 200 g Broccoli | 150 g Flour | 50 g Cornstarch | 250 ml Ice Water | 1 whole Egg | 200 ml Dashi | 60 ml Soy Sauce | 60 ml Mirin | 80 g Grated Daikon
instructions: 制作tentsuyu：将dashi、soy和mirin一起炖煮3分钟，离火冷却。(3 min) | 混合flour、cornstarch、egg和ice water，不要过度搅拌。| 将油加热至180°C，约需5分钟。在最后一刻调制面糊：将flour、cornstarch、egg和ice water混合，不要过度搅拌，然后将vegetables裹上面糊。(5 min) | 分批油炸2至3分钟，至淡金色酥脆。炸制过程中注意保持面糊冷却。(3 min) | 沥油后盛出，搭配tentsuyu和磨碎的daikon上桌。

name: Japanese Curry Rice
description: Golden curry with chicken, potato and carrot over steamed rice.
pro_tip: Replace jasmine rice with Koshihikari for authentic texture and finish with a cold butter mount for a glossy, 5-star sheen.
ingredients: 600 g Chicken Thighs | 3 whole Potato | 2 whole Carrot | 2 whole Onion | 100 g Japanese Curry Roux | 320 g Jasmine Rice | 3 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 2 tbsp Oil
instructions: Brown chicken. Remove. (5 min) | Saute onion, garlic and ginger until soft. (5 min) | Add potato and carrot. Add 600ml water. Bring to boil. | Simmer 20 min. Add curry roux blocks, stir until smooth. (20 min) | Add chicken back. Simmer 5 min. Serve over rice. (5 min)

name: Salmon Onigiri
description: Triangular rice balls filled with flaked salmon and wrapped in nori.
pro_tip: Integrate toasted sesame oil or fresh shiso leaves into the filling for aromatic depth.
ingredients: 400 g Sushi Rice | 200 g Salmon Fillet | 1 tbsp Soy Sauce | 8 whole Nori Sheets | 1 tsp Salt | 1 tbsp Sesame Seeds | 2 tbsp Rice Vinegar
instructions: Cook and season rice with vinegar and salt. | Pan-fry salmon. Flake and toss with soy sauce. | With wet, salted hands form rice into triangles around salmon filling. | Wrap base of each with nori strip. | Sprinkle sesame and serve or wrap for lunchbox.

name: Matcha Cheesecake
description: Silky Japanese baked cheesecake with earthy matcha and graham base.
pro_tip: Replace the cracker crust with a toasted almond or yuzu-infused shortbread for a sophisticated crunch.
ingredients: 500 g Cream Cheese | 120 g Sugar | 3 whole Eggs | 3 tbsp Matcha Powder | 150 ml Double Cream | 150 g Graham Crackers | 60 g Butter | 1 tsp Vanilla
instructions: Crush crackers with butter. Press into tin. Bake 10 min. (10 min) | Beat cream cheese, sugar and vanilla until smooth. | Mix matcha with 2 tbsp hot water. Blend in. | Add eggs one at a time. Fold in cream. | Pour over base. Bake in water bath at 160C for 50 min. (50 min) | Cool in oven with door ajar. Refrigerate overnight. (60 min)

name: Edamame with Sea Salt
description: Boiled soya beans in pods seasoned with coarse sea salt.
pro_tip: Finish with a touch of toasted sesame oil and yuzu zest for complex aromatic depth.
ingredients: 400 g Edamame Pods | 2 tsp Sea Salt | 0.5 tsp Chilli Flakes
instructions: Bring salted water to boil. Add edamame, cook 5 min. (5 min) | Drain. Toss with sea salt and chilli flakes. | Serve warm or at room temperature.

name: Beef Sukiyaki
description: Hot-pot beef and vegetables simmered in sweet soy broth.
pro_tip: Incorporate beef tallow for the initial sear to enhance umami depth and replace sugar with a touch of pear puree for natural sweetness.
ingredients: 500 g Beef Sirloin | 300 g Firm Tofu | 150 g Shiitake Mushrooms | 400 g Napa Cabbage | 200 g Konnyaku Noodles | 6 whole Spring Onion | 100 ml Soy Sauce | 100 ml Mirin | 80 ml Sake | 3 tbsp Sugar | 4 whole Eggs
instructions: Make warishita: mix soy, mirin, sake and sugar. Bring to boil. (3 min) | Heat sukiyaki pan. Sear a few beef slices first. | Add warishita, then vegetables, tofu and noodles. | Simmer together, adding more sauce as needed. (15 min) | Each person beats a raw egg and dips cooked ingredients.

name: Oyakodon
description: Chicken and egg simmered in dashi and soy - the classic donburi.
pro_tip: Substitute Jasmine with premium short-grain rice and introduce Mitsuba for a more sophisticated aromatic profile.
ingredients: 400 g Chicken Thighs | 6 whole Eggs | 1 whole Onion | 250 ml Dashi | 3 tbsp Soy Sauce | 3 tbsp Mirin | 1 tbsp Sugar | 320 g Jasmine Rice | 3 whole Spring Onion | 2 sheets Nori
instructions: Cook rice. | Slice chicken and onion. Simmer in dashi, soy, mirin and sugar 8 min. (8 min) | Pour lightly beaten eggs over. Cover and cook 2 min - keep runny. (2 min) | Slide over rice bowls. | Top with sliced spring onion and shredded nori.

name: Agedashi Tofu
description: Silken tofu in crisp coating served in umami dashi broth.
pro_tip: Finish with high-quality katsuobushi flakes to add essential smoky umami and visual movement.
ingredients: 600 g Silken Tofu | 80 g Cornstarch | 300 ml Dashi | 3 tbsp Soy Sauce | 2 tbsp Mirin | 80 g Grated Daikon | 1 tsp Grated Ginger | 3 whole Spring Onion
instructions: Drain tofu on paper towels 30 min. Cut into cubes. (30 min) | Make broth: simmer dashi, soy and mirin. | Coat tofu in cornstarch. Deep fry at 180C until crispy, 4 min. (4 min) | Place tofu in bowls. Pour hot broth around. | Top with grated daikon, ginger and spring onion.

name: Katsudon
description: Crispy pork cutlet simmered with egg in sweet soy over rice.
pro_tip: Swap jasmine for Koshihikari rice and use pork tenderloin for a more refined, lean finish.
ingredients: 4 whole Pork Loin Chops | 120 g Panko Breadcrumbs | 6 whole Eggs | 60 g Flour | 1 whole Onion | 250 ml Dashi | 3 tbsp Soy Sauce | 3 tbsp Mirin | 1 tbsp Sugar | 320 g Jasmine Rice
instructions: Pound pork thin. Coat in flour, beaten egg, panko. Fry until golden, 6 min. (6 min) | Simmer onion in dashi, soy, mirin and sugar 5 min. (5 min) | Slice katsu. Place in pan with onions. | Pour beaten egg over. Cover and cook 90 sec. (2 min) | Slide over rice. Serve immediately.

name: Shabu Shabu
description: Japanese hot pot - thin beef slices swished in kombu broth.
pro_tip: Upgrade to a blended dashi using katsuobushi and use 'Momiji Oroshi' (chili-spiked daikon) to sharpen the ponzu's acidity.
ingredients: 600 g Beef Ribeye | 20 g Kombu | 400 g Napa Cabbage | 300 g Tofu | 150 g Enoki Mushrooms | 400 g Udon Noodles | 150 ml Ponzu Sauce | 150 ml Sesame Dipping Sauce | 4 whole Spring Onion | 100 g Grated Daikon
instructions: Soak kombu in cold water 30 min. Heat to just under boiling. Remove kombu. (30 min) | Arrange raw ingredients at table. | Each person swishes thin beef slices in broth 10-15 sec. | Dip in ponzu or sesame sauce with daikon and spring onion. | Add vegetables and noodles to broth as you go.

name: Japanese Potato Salad
description: Creamy mashed potato salad with cucumber, carrot and Japanese mayo.
pro_tip: Introduce Japanese hot mustard (karashi) and high-quality ham to create complex layers of flavor.
ingredients: 600 g Potatoes | 1 whole Cucumber | 1 whole Carrot | 0.5 whole Onion | 2 whole Eggs | 80 g Japanese Mayo | 2 tbsp Rice Vinegar | 1 tsp Salt | 0.5 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: Boil potatoes until soft. Drain and mash roughly. (20 min) | Hard boil eggs. Cool, peel and chop. (12 min) | Salt cucumber, squeeze dry. Salt onion, rinse and squeeze. | Combine all with mayo, vinegar, salt and pepper. | Refrigerate at least 30 min. (30 min)

name: 酱油��面
description: 清澈酱油汤底拉面，配叉烧、笋干和溏心蛋。
pro_tip: 调制浓缩酱汁并制作香料油，可大幅提升风味层次。
ingredients: 400 g Ramen Noodles | 1 l Chicken Broth | 80 ml Soy Sauce | 40 ml Mirin | 200 g Pork Belly Chashu | 4 whole Marinated Eggs | 100 g Bamboo Shoots | 4 sheets Nori | 4 whole Spring Onion | 1 tsp Sesame Oil
instructions: 将高汤、soy和mirin混合，小火炖煮10分钟，加入sesame oil。(10 min) | 按包装说明煮noodles，分装入碗。 | 舀入热汤。 | 铺上切片chashu、对半切的egg、bamboo、nori和spring onion。

name: 纳豆饭
description: 发酵soya beans与soy、mustard和spring onion拌匀，盖在米饭上。
pro_tip: 将茉莉香米换成调味短粒米，加入刻み芥末或腌萝卜，增添酸爽对比。
ingredients: 2 packs Natto | 200 g Jasmine Rice | 1 tbsp Soy Sauce | 1 tsp Japanese Mustard | 2 whole Spring Onion | 2 whole Egg Yolk | 2 sheets Nori
instructions: 煮rice。 | 将natto与soy和mustard大力搅拌至出丝、飘香。 | 盛在rice上，放上spring onion和egg yolk。 | 旁边配撕碎的nori一同上桌。

name: 唐扬炸鸡
description: 日式炸鸡，外酥里嫩，味道浓郁。
pro_tip: 搭配柚子胡椒风味蛋黄酱，为丰腴的油脂增添精致的酸香层次。
ingredients: 700 g Chicken Thighs | 3 tbsp Soy Sauce | 2 tbsp Sake | 20 g Ginger | 3 cloves Garlic | 80 g Cornstarch | 40 g Flour | 500 ml Oil | 2 whole Lemon | 60 g Japanese Mayo
instructions: 将chicken切块，用soy、sake、ginger和garlic腌制30分钟。(30 min) | 混合cornstarch和flour，裹在chicken上。 | 分批在175°C油温下炸5分钟至金黄。(5 min) | 静置3分钟后再炸1分钟，更加酥脆。(1 min) | 配lemon wedges和Japanese mayo上桌。

name: 笊篱荞麦面
description: 冷荞麦面配蘸汁和wasabi。
pro_tip: 将面条放入冰水中急冷，以获得标志性的弹牙口感。
ingredients: 320 g Soba Noodles | 400 ml Dashi | 80 ml Soy Sauce | 60 ml Mirin | 2 tsp Wasabi | 4 whole Spring Onion | 4 sheets Nori | 2 tbsp Sesame Seeds
instructions: 制作tsuyu：将dashi、soy和mirin小火熬煮，冷却至室温。(5 min) | 按包装说明煮soba，沥干后用冷水冲洗至完全冷却。(8 min) | 将noodles摆放在竹盘或盘子上。 | 用nori strips、sesame和spring onion装饰。 | 将tsuyu和wasabi一同置于旁边供蘸食。

name: 玉子烧
description: 卷制甜味蛋卷，日式早餐定番。
pro_tip: 适量减少sugar用量，加一撮海盐，可突出egg本身的鲜味。
ingredients: 4 whole Eggs | 3 tbsp Dashi | 1 tsp Soy Sauce | 1 tbsp Mirin | 1 tsp Sugar | 1 tsp Oil
instructions: 将eggs与dashi、soy、mirin和sugar搅打均匀。 | 加热方形锅，薄薄涂一层oil。 | 倒入薄薄一层egg液，刚刚凝固时从一端向前卷起。 | 将蛋卷推到一侧，涂oil，倒入下一层egg液，提起蛋卷让液体流入底部。 | 重复3次，每次卷起后切成圆片。(10 min)

name: 炸猪排
description: panko酥炸猪排，配细切卷心菜和tonkatsu sauce。
pro_tip: 裹粉前直接给猪肉调味，并将细切卷心菜放入冰水中浸泡，确保最佳脆度。
ingredients: 4 whole Pork Loin Chops | 150 g Panko Breadcrumbs | 80 g Flour | 2 whole Eggs | 400 g Cabbage | 80 ml Tonkatsu Sauce | 1 tsp Japanese Mustard | 500 ml Oil
instructions: 将pork拍打至1厘米厚，在脂肪边缘划刀以防卷曲。 | 依次裹上flour、打散的egg和panko。 | 在170°C油温下炸至金黄，约6分钟。(6 min) | ���在网架上静置2分钟。(2 min) | 切片后摆在细切卷心菜上，配tonkatsu sauce和mustard上桌。

name: 铜锣烧
description: 松软煎饼夹甜红豆沙。
pro_tip: 加入海盐并将water换成milk，以增添浓郁感和湿润度。
ingredients: 200 g Flour | 80 g Sugar | 3 whole Eggs | 2 tbsp Honey | 2 tsp Baking Powder | 1 tbsp Mirin | 300 g Red Bean Paste | 100 ml Water
instructions: 将eggs、sugar、honey、mirin和water混合，筛入flour和baking powder。 | 静置面糊15分钟。(15 min) | 在薄薄涂油的锅中煎小pancakes，每面2分钟。(4 min) | 放凉后，用一勺red bean paste夹在两片pancake之间。

name: 麻薯冰淇淋
description: 柔软糯米皮包裹冰淇淋球。
pro_tip: 将matcha与干flour一同搅匀以确保颜色均匀，并用potato starch代替cornstarch，避免口感粉涩。
ingredients: 200 g Glutinous Rice Flour | 80 g Sugar | 200 ml Water | 500 ml Vanilla Ice Cream | 2 tbsp Matcha Powder | 80 g Cornstarch
instructions: 将ice cream挖成球状，冷冻至完全凝固，约2小时。(120 min) | 混合rice flour、sugar和water，微波2分钟，搅拌后再微波1分钟。(3 min) | 倒在撒有cornstarch的台面上，分成8份。 | 将每份压扁，包裹一个ice cream球，捏紧封口。 | 立即享用或冷冻保存最多1周。

name: 茶碗蒸
description: 丝滑蒸蛋羹，配鸡肉、虾仁和香菇。
pro_tip: 加入银杏果以增添正宗口感，并将chicken预先焯水，确保蛋羹清澈无浑浊。
ingredients: 4 whole Eggs | 500 ml Dashi | 2 tbsp Soy Sauce | 1 tbsp Mirin | 100 g Chicken Thigh | 100 g Prawns | 80 g Shiitake Mushrooms | 3 whole Spring Onion
instructions: 将eggs与dashi、soy和mirin混合，过细筛过滤。 | 将chicken、prawns和mushrooms分装入4个杯中。 | 小心倒入蛋液，盖上foil。 | 以极小火蒸20分钟，切勿沸腾，否则会产生气泡。(20 min) | 用spring onion点缀，温热上桌。

name: 日式轻乳酪蛋糕
description: 极度轻盈、棉软的烤乳酪蛋糕，口感细嫩Q弹。
pro_tip: 将lemon zest浸入milk中，为cream cheese浓郁的脂质底味增添清新亮感。
ingredients: 250 g Cream Cheese | 50 g Butter | 100 ml Milk | 6 whole Eggs | 60 g Flour | 20 g Cornstarch | 130 g Sugar | 2 tbsp Lemon Juice | 1 tsp Vanilla
instructions: 将cream cheese、butter和milk用小火加热至顺滑，放凉。 | 加入egg yolks、flour、cornstarch、lemon和vanilla搅打均匀。 | 将蛋白与sugar打发至硬性发泡，分三次轻柔折入面糊。 | 倒入铺好烘焙纸的模具，以160°C水浴法烘烤55分钟。(55 min) | 烤箱门微开，在烤箱内冷却10分钟后再取出。

name: 拌饭
description: 米饭上铺满调味蔬菜、辣椒酱和煎蛋。
pro_tip: 上桌前才淋上优质冷压熟芝麻油，以最大程度保留香气。
ingredients: 320 g Jasmine Rice | 150 g Spinach | 2 whole Carrot | 1 whole Courgette | 150 g Bean Sprouts | 100 g Shiitake Mushrooms | 4 whole Eggs | 3 tbsp Gochujang | 3 tbsp Sesame Oil | 2 tbsp Soy Sauce | 2 cloves Garlic | 2 tbsp Sesame Seeds
instructions: 煮米饭。 | 焯烫spinach，挤干水分，用sesame oil和garlic调味。 | 将carrot和courgette分别切丝炒熟。 | 用soy炒mushrooms。 | 煎荷包蛋（蛋黄朝上）。 | 将米饭盛入碗中，铺上蔬菜和鸡蛋，配gochujang和sesame seeds上桌。

name: 韩式烤牛肉
description: 薄切腌制牛肉在餐桌上现烤而成。
pro_tip: 上桌前淋上少许熟芝麻油，以保留易挥发的香气。
ingredients: 600 g Beef Ribeye | 80 ml Soy Sauce | 3 tbsp Sugar | 2 tbsp Sesame Oil | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 0.5 whole Pear | 4 whole Spring Onion | 2 tbsp Sesame Seeds | 1 head Lettuce
instructions: 将pear、garlic和ginger搅打成泥，与soy、sugar和sesame oil混合。 | 将beef切成极薄片，腌制30分钟。(30 min) | 大火每面烤2至3分钟。(3 min) | 配lettuce wraps、rice和kimchi上桌。 | 撒上sesame seeds和spring onion。

name: 泡菜汤
description: 以豆腐和猪肉烹制的辛辣泡菜炖锅，是韩国的灵魂美食。
pro_tip: 用小鱼干昆布高汤代替清水，并使用腌制至少六个月的kimchi。
ingredients: 300 g Kimchi | 250 g Pork Belly | 300 g Firm Tofu | 2 tbsp Gochugaru | 2 tbsp Gochujang | 2 tbsp Soy Sauce | 1 tbsp Sesame Oil | 3 cloves Garlic | 1 whole Onion | 4 whole Spring Onion
instructions: 在锅中将pork belly煎至上色。(5 min) | 加入kimchi和gochugaru，翻炒3分钟。(3 min) | 加入600ml水、gochujang、soy和garlic。 | 炖煮15分钟。(15 min) | 加入tofu，再炖5分钟。(5 min) | 最后��上sesame oil，撒上spring onion，配rice上桌。

name: 炒年糕
description: 糯软年糕裹在香甜辛辣的辣椒酱汁中。
pro_tip: 用浓郁的小鱼干昆布高汤代替清水，以提升酱汁的层次感。
ingredients: 500 g Tteok Rice Cakes | 3 tbsp Gochujang | 1 tbsp Gochugaru | 2 tbsp Sugar | 1 tbsp Soy Sauce | 150 g Fish Cakes | 4 whole Spring Onion | 1 tbsp Sesame Seeds | 2 whole Boiled Eggs
instructions: 若tteok较硬，先用冷水浸泡10分钟。(10 min) | 将gochujang、gochugaru、sugar和soy与500ml水在锅中混合，煮沸。 | 加入tteok和fish cakes，边搅拌边炖煮10分钟直至酱汁浓稠。(10 min) | 用spring onion、sesame和对半切开的煮鸡蛋装饰。

name: 杂菜
description: 玻璃粉条与蔬菜和芝麻一同翻炒而成。
pro_tip: 用mirin和honey代替精制白糖，为粉条增添更精致光亮的釉面。
ingredients: 300 g Glass Noodles | 100 g Spinach | 1 whole Carrot | 1 whole Onion | 100 g Shiitake Mushrooms | 1 whole Egg | 3 tbsp Soy Sauce | 3 tbsp Sesame Oil | 2 tbsp Sugar | 2 cloves Garlic | 2 tbsp Sesame Seeds
instructions: 将noodles在热水中浸泡10分钟，沥干。(10 min) | 将每种蔬菜分别与garlic炒熟。 | 煎薄蛋皮并切成条状。 | 大火将noodles与soy、sesame oil和sugar翻炒均匀。(3 min) | 与蔬菜混合，撒上sesame seeds。

name: 大酱汤
description: 以发酵豆酱烹制的炖锅，配以豆腐、西葫芦和蘑菇。
pro_tip: 先将gochugaru和garlic在sesame oil中炒香，再加入高汤，以加深香气层次。
ingredients: 300 g Firm Tofu | 4 tbsp Doenjang | 1 whole Courgette | 1 whole Potato | 80 g Shiitake Mushrooms | 1 whole Onion | 3 cloves Garlic | 1 tsp Gochugaru | 3 whole Spring Onion | 600 ml Anchovy Stock
instructions: 将anchovy stock煮至微沸。 | 加入doenjang，搅拌至溶化。 | 加入potato和onion，煮8分钟。(8 min) | 加���courgette、mushrooms、tofu和garlic。 | 炖煮8分钟，最后加入gochugaru和spring onion。(8 min)

name: 烤五花肉
description: 烤猪五花肉配大蒜、包饭酱和紫苏叶卷食。
pro_tip: 使用优质海盐和冷压芝麻油来提升蘸料的品质。
ingredients: 700 g Pork Belly Slices | 8 cloves Garlic | 20 whole Perilla Leaves | 1 head Lettuce | 80 g Ssamjang | 200 g Kimchi | 2 tbsp Sesame Oil | 1 tsp Salt
instructions: 将pork belly切片放在热烤盘上，频繁翻面烤至酥脆，共12分钟。(12 min) | 将garlic切片一同烤至金黄。 | 将pork、garlic和kimchi用lettuce包裹，加入perilla leaves和ssamjang。 | 蘸sesame oil和salt食用。

name: 嫩豆腐锅
description: 以海鲜烹制的极嫩豆腐辛辣汤锅，最后打入鸡蛋。
pro_tip: 用细香葱芽和辣椒丝装饰，增添精致的视觉美感。
ingredients: 600 g Soft Silken Tofu | 300 g Mixed Seafood | 3 tbsp Gochugaru | 2 tbsp Soy Sauce | 1 tbsp Sesame Oil | 3 cloves Garlic | 1 whole Onion | 4 whole Spring Onion | 4 whole Eggs | 600 ml Anchovy Stock
instructions: 用sesame oil将garlic和onion炒香。(3 min) | 加入gochugaru，翻炒1分钟。(1 min) | 加入stock，煮沸。 | 加入seafood和大块tofu，炖煮8分钟。(8 min) | 在每个小锅中打入一颗egg，盖盖焖1分钟。(1 min) | 用soy调味，撒上spring onion。

name: 韩式紫菜包饭
description: 以鸡蛋、菠菜、胡萝卜和鱼糕为馅料的韩式紫菜饭卷。
pro_tip: 在白米中混入部分压制大麦，以降低整体升糖指数。
ingredients: 400 g Sushi Rice | 6 whole Nori Sheets | 3 whole Eggs | 150 g Spinach | 2 whole Carrot | 200 g Fish Cakes | 100 g Pickled Radish | 2 tbsp Sesame Oil | 1 tsp Salt | 2 tbsp Sesame Seeds
instructions: 将rice煮熟放凉，用sesame oil和salt调味。 | 制作蛋皮条，焯烫并��味spinach，炒熟carrot，煎香fish cake条。 | 将nori铺在竹帘上，铺上rice，顶部留3厘米空白。 | 将馅料排成一排，紧紧卷起，边缘用水封口。 | 切成圆片，刷上sesame oil。(10 min)

instructions: 将gochujang、gochugaru、soy、sugar、garlic和sesame oil混合成腌料。 | 将chicken与一半腌料拌匀，静置15分钟。(15 min) | 大火将chicken与sweet potato和tteok翻炒。(5 min) | 加入cabbage、onion和剩余腌料，翻炒10分钟。(10 min) | 配rice上桌。

name: 中式蛋炒饭

name: 北京烤鸭

instructions: 将beef逆纹切薄片，用soy、wine和cornstarch腌制15分钟。(15 min) | 将broccoli焯水2分钟，捞出沥干。(2 min) | 大火翻炒beef约2分钟，盛出备用。(2 min) | 爆香garlic和ginger，加入oyster sauce和broth翻炒。(2 min) | 将beef和broccoli倒回锅中翻炒均匀，最后淋上sesame oil。

instructions: 将noodles煮熟，捞出沥干。 | 将pork与garlic、ginger一同煸炒至上色，加入soy和Sichuan pepper调味。(5 min) | 调制酱汁：tahini、chilli oil、soy、vinegar混合均匀。 | 将noodles分碗盛装，淋上酱汁和肉末。 | 撒上sesame seeds、peanuts和spring onion。

instructions: （可使用市售wonton wrappers，或自制：将200g flour、1个egg和60ml water混合，揉至光滑，醒面30分钟，擀至极薄后切成方形。）将pork、minced prawns、ginger、soy和sesame oil混合搅拌均匀。 | 取一茶匙馅料放于wrapper中央，折叠封口包成馄饨形状。 | 将wontons放入沸水中煮4至5分钟，至浮起且熟透为止。(5 min) | 调制酱汁：chilli oil、soy、vinegar、sugar、garlic混合均匀。 | 将wontons捞出沥干，拌入酱汁，撒上spring onion即可。

instructions: 将aubergine切好，加盐静置10分钟，擦干。(10 min) | 将aubergine煎至金黄，取出备用。(5 min) | 翻炒doubanjiang、garlic和ginger至香气四溢。(2 min) | 加入broth、soy和sugar，炖煮。 | 放回aubergine，用cornstarch勾芡，最后撒上Sichuan pepper并淋上sesame oil。

name: 香��菠萝包

pro_tip: 腌制前将排骨在冷水中浸泡20分钟，去除杂质，使成品更加干净清爽。
ingredients: 600 g Pork Ribs | 2 tbsp Fermented Black Beans | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 3 tbsp Soy Sauce | 1 tsp Sesame Oil | 2 tbsp Cornstarch | 1 tsp Sugar | 2 whole Chilli | 3 whole Spring Onion
instructions: 将ribs斩成3厘米段，冲洗干净。 | 将black beans与garlic和ginger捣碎，加入soy、sesame和cornstarch混合均匀。 | 将ribs拌入腌料，静置20分钟。(20 min) | 将排骨铺成单层放入蒸盘中。 | 蒸20分钟至软烂。(20 min) | 撒上spring onion和chilli。
name_en: Steamed Pork Ribs with Black Bean

name: 泰式炒河粉
description: 炒米粉配鸡蛋、豆腐、豆芽和罗望子。
pro_tip: 最后淋上优质烤花生油并用大火快炒，确保产生独特的焦香气味。
ingredients: 300 g Rice Noodles | 200 g Firm Tofu | 3 whole Eggs | 150 g Bean Sprouts | 200 g Prawns | 4 whole Spring Onion | 60 g Peanuts | 3 tbsp Tamarind Paste | 3 tbsp Fish Sauce | 2 tbsp Palm Sugar | 2 whole Lime | 1 tsp Chilli Flakes
instructions: 将noodles浸泡在温水中20分钟，沥干。(20 min) | 将tamarind、fish sauce和palm sugar混合成酱汁。 | 将tofu炒至金黄，加入prawns。(3 min) | 推到锅边，在中间炒散eggs。(2 min) | 加入noodles和酱汁，翻炒均匀。(2 min) | 加入bean sprouts，撒上peanuts、spring onion、chilli和lime。

name: 绿咖喱
description: 香浓绿咖喱配鸡肉、椰浆和泰国罗勒。
pro_tip: 将咖喱酱炒至油脂明显分离，以最大程度释放香气。
ingredients: 600 g Chicken Thighs | 400 ml Coconut Milk | 3 tbsp Green Curry Paste | 20 g Thai Basil | 1 whole Courgette | 100 g Bamboo Shoots | 2 tbsp Fish Sauce | 1 tbsp Palm Sugar | 4 whole Kaffir Lime Leaves | 2 stalks Lemongrass | 320 g Jasmine Rice
instructions: 用3汤匙浓thick coconut milk将curry paste炒香2分钟。(2 min) | 加入chicken，煮3分钟。(3 min) | 加入剩余的coconut milk、lemongrass和kaffir lime。 | 加入courgette和bamboo，炖煮12分钟。(12 min) | 用fish sauce和palm sugar调味，拌入Thai basil。 | 配jasmine rice上桌。

name: 冬阴功汤
description: 酸辣虾汤，配香茅、南姜和泰国柠檬叶。
pro_tip: 点缀几滴辣椒油，提升视觉效果和香气层次。
ingredients: 400 g Prawns | 3 stalks Lemongrass | 30 g Galangal | 6 whole Kaffir Lime Leaves | 4 whole Chilli | 3 tbsp Fish Sauce | 60 ml Lime Juice | 150 g Mushrooms | 2 whole Tomatoes | 4 whole Spring Onion | 20 g Coriander | 800 ml Chicken Broth
instructions: 将lemongrass、galangal和kaffir lime拍扁，放入高汤中炖煮10分钟。(10 min) | 加入chilli、mushrooms和tomatoes。 | 加入prawns，煮3分钟。(3 min) | 用fish sauce和lime juice调味。 | 撒上spring onion和coriander，立即上桌。

name: 马沙文咖喱
description: 浓郁牛肉咖喱配土豆、花生和温热香料。
pro_tip: 将炖煮时间延长至2.5小时以获得入口即化的口感，使用前将整粒香料干炒以释放精油。
ingredients: 600 g Beef Chuck | 400 ml Coconut Milk | 4 tbsp Massaman Curry Paste | 3 whole Potato | 80 g Peanuts | 1 whole Onion | 2 tbsp Fish Sauce | 2 tbsp Palm Sugar | 1 tbsp Tamarind Paste | 2 whole Star Anise | 3 pods Cardamom | 320 g Jasmine Rice
instructions: 将coconut milk顶部的浓thick cream舀入热锅，将beef煎至上色，加入curry paste炒3分钟。(3 min) | 加入剩余的coconut milk、potato、star anise和cardamom。 | 炖煮40分钟至beef软烂。(40 min) | 加入peanuts和onion，炖煮5分钟。(5 min) | 用fish sauce、palm sugar和tamarind调味。 | 配jasmine rice上桌。

name: 青木瓜沙拉
description: 青木瓜沙拉，配青柠、鱼露、辣椒和花生。
pro_tip: 将切丝的papaya浸泡在冰水中15分钟以保持最佳脆度，使用优质发酵fish sauce以增加醇厚层次。
ingredients: 500 g Green Papaya | 150 g Cherry Tomatoes | 100 g Green Beans | 60 g Peanuts | 2 cloves Garlic | 3 whole Chilli | 3 whole Lime | 3 tbsp Fish Sauce | 2 tbsp Palm Sugar | 2 tbsp Dried Shrimp
instructions: 在石臼中将garlic和chilli捣至出汁。 | 加入dried shrimp和sugar，略捣几下。 | 加入papaya、beans和tomatoes，轻轻捣拌。 | 用lime和fish sauce调味。 | 撒上peanuts后上桌。

name: 红咖喱烤鸭
description: 浓郁红咖喱配烤鸭、荔枝和泰国罗勒。
pro_tip: 最后加入新鲜lime juice和泰国鸟眼辣椒，达到五星级的酸度与辣度平衡。
ingredients: 4 whole Duck Breasts | 400 ml Coconut Milk | 3 tbsp Red Curry Paste | 200 g Lychees | 150 g Cherry Tomatoes | 20 g Thai Basil | 2 tbsp Fish Sauce | 1 tbsp Palm Sugar | 4 whole Kaffir Lime Leaves
instructions: 在duck上划刀，鸭皮朝下煎8分钟。(8 min) | 将coconut milk顶部的浓thick cream舀入热wok，将curry paste炒香2分钟。(2 min) | 加入coconut milk和kaffir lime。 | 将duck切片后加入咖喱中。 | 炖煮12分钟，加入lychees和tomatoes。(12 min) | 用fish sauce和palm sugar调味，拌入basil。

name: 泰式酱油炒河粉
description: 宽米粉与鸡蛋、芥蓝和酱油一起翻炒。
pro_tip: 加入发酵豆酱增添鲜味层次，使用palm sugar获得更浓郁的光泽感。
ingredients: 400 g Wide Rice Noodles | 400 g Chicken Thighs | 300 g Chinese Broccoli | 3 whole Eggs | 3 tbsp Dark Soy Sauce | 2 tbsp Light Soy Sauce | 3 tbsp Oyster Sauce | 1 tbsp Sugar | 4 cloves Garlic | 3 tbsp Oil
instructions: 将noodles分开，混合soy sauces、oyster sauce和sugar。 | 在极热的wok中爆香garlic。 | 加入chicken，炒3分钟。(3 min) | 推到锅边，炒散eggs。(1 min) | 加入noodles和酱汁，翻炒至noodles略带焦香。(3 min) | 加入Chinese broccoli，再翻炒1分钟。(1 min)

name: 椰浆鸡汤
description: 椰浆鸡汤配南姜、香茅和泰国柠檬叶。
pro_tip: 最后加入优质辣椒油和微型香菜叶，提升摆盘效果并呈现现代风味层次。
ingredients: 400 g Chicken Breast | 400 ml Coconut Milk | 30 g Galangal | 2 stalks Lemongrass | 6 whole Kaffir Lime Leaves | 150 g Mushrooms | 3 tbsp Fish Sauce | 2 whole Lime | 3 whole Chilli | 20 g Coriander | 1 tbsp Palm Sugar
instructions: 将lemongrass、galangal和kaffir lime拍扁。 | 将coconut milk与香料一起炖煮8分钟。(8 min) | 加入chicken和mushrooms，煮10分钟。(10 min) | 用fish sauce、lime和palm sugar调味。 | 盛入碗中，撒上coriander和chilli。

name: 芒果糯米饭
description: 甜糯米饭配熟芒果和咸椰浆。
pro_tip: 加入烤绿豆增添脆感，并在椰浆中多加一些盐以平衡甜味。
ingredients: 300 g Glutinous Rice | 2 whole Ripe Mango | 400 ml Coconut Milk | 60 g Sugar | 1 tsp Salt | 1 tbsp Sesame Seeds
instructions: 将rice浸泡4小时，蒸20分钟。(20 min) | 将coconut milk与sugar和salt加热至溶化。 | 将2/3的coconut sauce倒在热rice上，搅拌均匀，静置15分钟。(15 min) | 将mango切片。 | 将rice与mango一起上桌，淋上剩余的coconut sauce并撒上sesame seeds。

name: 泰式肉末沙拉
description: 肉末沙拉配烤米粉、青柠和新鲜香草。
pro_tip: 用拍扁的香茅浸泡煮肉的汤汁，并加少许palm sugar以平衡突出的酸味。
ingredients: 500 g Ground Pork | 3 tbsp Toasted Rice Powder | 4 whole Shallots | 3 tbsp Fish Sauce | 3 whole Lime | 2 tsp Chilli Flakes | 30 g Mint | 20 g Coriander | 4 whole Spring Onion | 1 stalk Lemongrass
instructions: 将pork在少量清水中煮至刚好熟透。(8 min) | 将raw rice放入干锅中烤至金黄，磨成粉末。(5 min) | 将pork与toasted rice、shallots、spring onion混合。 | 用fish sauce、lime和chilli调味。 | 拌入mint和coriander，配sticky rice和lettuce上桌。

name: 打抛猪肉
description: 用圣罗勒、蚝油和煎蛋炒制的碎猪肉。
pro_tip: 如果酱汁收得太快，可以加少量水或高汤来保持湿润，同时不增加额外的油脂。
ingredients: 500 g Ground Pork | 30 g Holy Basil | 5 cloves Garlic | 5 whole Chilli | 3 tbsp Oyster Sauce | 2 tbsp Fish Sauce | 1 tbsp Dark Soy Sauce | 1 tsp Sugar | 2 tbsp Oil | 4 whole Eggs | 320 g Jasmine Rice
instructions: 在烧热的锅中爆香 garlic 和 chilli。(1 min) | 加入 pork，大火翻炒，边炒边打散，炒4分钟。(4 min) | 加入 oyster sauce、fish sauce、soy 和 sugar，翻炒均匀。(1 min) | 放入 basil 翻炒至刚刚萎软。| 另起锅煎 eggs，煎至边缘酥脆。将猪肉盛在 rice 上，顶部放上煎蛋即可上桌。

name: 清迈咖喱面
description: 北泰风味椰奶咖喱汤面，配鸡肉和酥脆炸面。
pro_tip: 在咖喱酱中加入烤香的 coriander seeds 和 black cardamom，可将风味提升至顶级水准。
ingredients: 600 g Chicken Thighs | 400 ml Coconut Milk | 4 tbsp Khao Soi Paste | 400 g Egg Noodles | 3 tbsp Fish Sauce | 2 tbsp Palm Sugar | 2 whole Lime | 60 g Pickled Mustard | 4 whole Shallots | 20 g Coriander
instructions: 将 coconut milk 顶部的浓稠椰浆舀入热锅中，加入 khao soi paste 煸炒2分钟。(2 min) | 加入 chicken，煎至上色，约3分钟。(3 min) | 加入剩余的 coconut milk 和200毫升水，小火炖15分钟。(15 min) | 煮 noodles，取一把炸至酥脆备用作装饰。(3 min) | 用 fish sauce、palm sugar 和 lime 调味。| 将 noodles 盛入汤碗，顶部放上酥脆 noodles、pickled mustard、shallots 和 coriander 即可上桌。

name: 泰式酥炸全鱼
description: 酥脆炸整鱼，淋上甜辣酱汁并点缀香草。
pro_tip: 将 coriander 和 spring onions 快速油炸，可作为专业感十足、口感丰富的装饰。
ingredients: 1.2 kg Whole Tilapia | 6 cloves Garlic | 5 whole Chilli | 3 tbsp Fish Sauce | 3 tbsp Palm Sugar | 3 tbsp Lime Juice | 4 whole Spring Onion | 20 g Coriander | 500 ml Oil
instructions: 在鱼身上划深刀，擦干水分。| 以180℃深炸至非常酥脆，约10至12分钟。(12 min) | 捞出沥油，用2汤匙油将 garlic 和 chilli 炸至酥脆。| 加入 fish sauce、palm sugar 和 lime，小火煮2分钟。(2 min) | 将酱汁淋在鱼上，以 spring onion 和 coriander 装饰。

name: 沙嗲配花生酱
description: 烤鸡肉串配姜黄腌料和花生蘸酱。
pro_tip: 用去皮鸡腿肉代替鸡胸肉，并在腌料中加入新鲜 lemongrass，以提升顶级香气层次。
ingredients: 500 g Chicken Breast | 2 tsp Turmeric | 2 tsp Coriander | 1 tsp Cumin | 100 ml Coconut Milk | 100 g Peanut Butter | 2 tbsp Soy Sauce | 2 whole Lime | 2 tbsp Palm Sugar | 2 whole Chilli | 2 cloves Garlic
instructions: 混合 turmeric、coriander、cumin 和 coconut milk，将 chicken strips 腌制30分钟。(30 min) | 穿入 skewers，每面烤4分钟。(8 min) | 制作 peanut sauce：将 peanut butter、soy、lime、palm sugar、garlic 和 chilli 搅拌均匀。| 将 skewers 与 peanut sauce 和 cucumber slices 一同上桌。

name: 烤牛肉沙拉
description: 烤牛肉沙拉，配薄荷、烤米粉和辣味青柠汁。
pro_tip: 将 shallots 放入冰水中浸泡，以增加爽脆口感并减轻辛辣气味。
ingredients: 400 g Beef Sirloin | 30 g Mint | 20 g Coriander | 4 whole Shallots | 2 tbsp Toasted Rice Powder | 3 tbsp Fish Sauce | 3 whole Lime | 2 tsp Chilli Flakes | 4 whole Spring Onion
instructions: 将 steak 烤至五成熟，静置5分钟后切薄片。(12 min) | 与 mint、coriander、shallots 和 spring onion 拌匀。| 用 fish sauce、lime 和 chilli 调味。| 撒上烤 rice powder，立即上桌。

name: 黄咖喱虾
description: 口味温和的姜黄椰奶咖喱，配虾和土豆。
pro_tip: 将 prawn 的烹煮时间缩短至两分钟，以获得鲜嫩口感，并加入新鲜 chili 增添视觉亮点。
ingredients: 400 g Prawns | 400 ml Coconut Milk | 3 tbsp Yellow Curry Paste | 2 whole Potato | 1 whole Onion | 2 tbsp Fish Sauce | 1 tbsp Palm Sugar | 3 whole Kaffir Lime Leaves | 320 g Jasmine Rice
instructions: 将 coconut milk 顶部的浓稠椰浆舀入热锅中，加入 yellow curry paste 煸炒2分钟。(2 min) | 加入剩余的 coconut milk 和 potato。| 小火炖12分钟至 potato 变软。(12 min) | 加入 prawns 和 kaffir lime，煮4分钟。(4 min) | 用 fish sauce 和 palm sugar 调味，配 jasmine rice 上桌。

name: 泰式炸鸡
description: 酥脆炸鸡，以鱼露、大蒜和香菜根腌制。
pro_tip: 在腌料中加入少许 palm sugar，以增强焦糖化效果和风味深度。
ingredients: 1 kg Chicken Pieces | 6 cloves Garlic | 4 whole Coriander Root | 2 tsp White Pepper | 3 tbsp Fish Sauce | 2 tbsp Oyster Sauce | 60 g Cornstarch | 60 g Flour | 500 ml Oil | 2 whole Lime
instructions: 用研钵将 garlic、coriander root 和 pepper 捣碎。| 与 fish sauce 和 oyster sauce 混合，将 chicken 腌制2小时。(120 min) | 混合 cornstarch 和 flour，裹在 chicken 上。| 以170℃炸至金黄熟透，约10至12分钟。(12 min) | 配 sticky rice 和 lime wedges 上桌。

name: 打抛豆腐
description: 泰式圣罗勒炒硬豆腐配蔬菜。
pro_tip: 改用素食 oyster sauce，并在最后加入少许 dark soy 以增加颜色深度。
ingredients: 400 g Firm Tofu | 30 g Holy Basil | 4 cloves Garlic | 4 whole Chilli | 3 tbsp Oyster Sauce | 2 tbsp Soy Sauce | 1 tsp Sugar | 150 g Mushrooms | 1 whole Red Pepper | 2 tbsp Oil
instructions: 将 tofu 压去水分，切成小块，煎至金黄。(6 min) | 在热锅中爆香 garlic 和 chilli。(1 min) | 加入 mushrooms 和 pepper，炒3分钟。(3 min) | 加入 tofu、oyster sauce、soy 和 sugar，翻炒均匀。(1 min) | 放入 basil 翻炒，配 jasmine rice 上桌。

name: 菠萝炒饭
description: 泰式炒饭，配菠萝、腰果、葡萄干和咖喱粉。
pro_tip: 最后加入少许 lime juice 和一撮 white pepper，以平衡 raisins 和 pineapple 的甜味。
ingredients: 500 g Cooked Jasmine Rice | 200 g Pineapple | 60 g Cashews | 150 g Prawns | 30 g Raisins | 2 whole Eggs | 2 tsp Curry Powder | 3 tbsp Soy Sauce | 1 tbsp Fish Sauce | 4 whole Spring Onion | 15 g Coriander
instructions: （隔夜的 jasmine rice 口感最佳。提前一天煮好300克 jasmine rice，摊开放在托盘上，不加盖放入冰箱冷藏一夜。）在热锅中将 eggs 炒散，盛出备用。(2 min) | 炒 prawns，加入 curry powder 和 rice 翻炒。| 大火翻炒3分钟。(3 min) | 加入 pineapple、cashews、raisins、soy 和 fish sauce。| 将 eggs 回锅，顶部撒上 spring onion 和 coriander。

name: 泰式虾饼
description: 酥脆虾饼，配青柠叶和黄瓜沙拉。
pro_tip: 加入切细的 long beans 以呈现传统口感，并用研钵研磨 curry paste 以充分融合。
ingredients: 400 g Prawns | 2 tbsp Red Curry Paste | 4 whole Kaffir Lime Leaves | 3 tbsp Cornstarch | 2 tbsp Fish Sauce | 1 whole Egg | 1 whole Cucumber | 3 tbsp Rice Vinegar | 2 tbsp Sugar | 40 g Peanuts | 2 whole Shallot
instructions: 将 prawns 与 curry paste、fish sauce、kaffir lime 和 egg 搅打成泥。| 塑形成扁圆饼，裹上 cornstarch。| 在1厘米深的油中煎至金黄，每面3分钟。(6 min) | 制作沙拉：将 cucumber、vinegar、sugar、shallots 和 peanuts 混合。| 将虾饼与沙拉一同上桌。

name: 泰式椰子汤
description: 温暖的椰奶汤底，搭配姜、香茅和蔬菜。
pro_tip: 在炖煮前将香茅和高良姜拍打，以最大限度地释放香气。
ingredients: 400 ml Coconut Milk | 400 ml Vegetable Broth | 2 stalks Lemongrass | 20 g Galangal | 4 whole Kaffir Lime Leaves | 200 g Tofu | 100 g Mushrooms | 100 g Spinach | 2 whole Lime | 3 whole Spring Onion | 15 g Coriander
instructions: 将 coconut milk 和高汤与 lemongrass、galangal 和 kaffir lime 一起炖煮8分钟。(8 min) | 加入 tofu 和 mushrooms，煮5分钟。(5 min) | 加入 spinach，焯软1分钟。(1 min) | 用 lime 和盐调味。| 盛盘后撒上 spring onion 和 coriander。

name: 泰式牛肉汤面
description: 浓郁牛肉汤底，搭配米粉、牛腩和泰式香料。
pro_tip: 将牛肉炖煮3小时，最后加入自制辣椒醋和炸蒜油，提升感官层次。
ingredients: 500 g Beef Brisket | 300 g Flat Rice Noodles | 1 l Beef Broth | 1 stick Cinnamon | 3 whole Star Anise | 3 tbsp Fish Sauce | 2 tbsp Soy Sauce | 2 tbsp Palm Sugar | 100 g Bean Sprouts | 4 whole Spring Onion | 20 g Thai Basil | 2 whole Lime
instructions: 将 beef 与 cinnamon 和 star anise 一起在高汤中炖煮25分钟。(25 min) | 用 fish sauce、soy 和 palm sugar 调味。| 按包装说明煮 rice noodles，捞出沥干。| 将 beef 切片。| 将 noodles、beef 和汤底盛入碗中。| 顶部放上 bean sprouts、spring onion、Thai basil 和 lime。

name: 香蕉煎饼
description: 酥脆的泰式街头煎饼，搭配香蕉、炼乳和鸡蛋。
pro_tip: 最后撒上少许海盐花，以平衡炼乳的甜腻感。
ingredients: 300 g Flour | 160 ml Warm Water | 0.5 tsp Salt | 4 tbsp Oil | 2 whole Bananas | 2 whole Eggs | 60 ml Condensed Milk | 20 g Butter
instructions: 将 flour、water、salt 和2汤匙 oil 混合揉成光滑面团，静置1小时。(60 min) | 分成4份，在抹油的台面上将面团擀成薄如纸张。| 放上涂黄油的热煎板上煎制。(1 min) | 在面团上磕入 egg 并放上切片 banana，折叠成信封形状。| 两面煎至金黄。(3 min) | 淋上 condensed milk，立即上桌。

name: 泰式罗勒煎蛋
description: 泰式街头煎蛋，边缘酥脆、中心嫩软，搭配打抛叶和辣椒。
pro_tip: 加入少许 lime juice，以中和油脂感。
ingredients: 3 whole Eggs | 20 g Holy Basil | 2 cloves Garlic | 2 whole Chilli | 1 tbsp Fish Sauce | 1 tbsp Oyster Sauce | 3 tbsp Oil
instructions: 将 eggs 轻轻打散。| 在大量 oil 中将 garlic 和 chilli 炸至刚刚金黄。(1 min) | 倒入 eggs，不要搅拌，让边缘酥脆2分钟。(2 min) | 加入 basil，轻轻折叠。| 用 fish sauce 和 oyster sauce 调味，盛在 jasmine rice 上即可。

name: 帕纳咖喱
description: 浓郁干香的帕纳咖喱，搭配椰浆、青柠叶和花生。
pro_tip: 用新鲜烘烤后捣碎的花生代替 peanut butter，口感更佳。
ingredients: 500 g Beef Sirloin | 400 ml Coconut Cream | 4 tbsp Panang Curry Paste | 6 whole Kaffir Lime Leaves | 2 tbsp Fish Sauce | 2 tbsp Palm Sugar | 2 tbsp Peanut Butter | 320 g Jasmine Rice | 2 whole Chilli
instructions: 将 Panang paste 在浓 coconut cream 中炒至出油，约3分钟。(3 min) | 加入 beef，翻炒3分钟。(3 min) | 加入剩余 coconut cream 和 kaffir lime。| 炖至酱汁浓稠，约12分钟。(12 min) | 拌入 peanut butter，用 fish sauce 和 palm sugar 调味。| 顶部放上 kaffir lime 细丝和 chilli，搭配 jasmine rice 上桌。

name: 泰式豆腐芒果沙拉
description: 酥脆豆腐沙拉，搭配芒果、黄瓜和酸甜青柠汁。
pro_tip: 最后撒上烤米粉，增添五星级口感和烟熏香气。
ingredients: 400 g Firm Tofu | 1 whole Mango | 1 whole Cucumber | 1 whole Carrot | 20 g Mint | 20 g Coriander | 60 g Peanuts | 3 whole Lime | 2 tbsp Soy Sauce | 2 tbsp Sesame Oil | 1 tsp Chilli Flakes | 1 tbsp Honey
instructions: 将 tofu 压干后切块，煎至金黄。(6 min) | 将 mango、cucumber 和 carrot 切成细丝。| 调制酱汁：混合 lime、soy、sesame oil、honey 和 chilli。| 将所有蔬菜、香草和 tofu 拌匀。| 淋上酱汁，顶部撒上 peanuts。

name: 卡侬科洛克
description: 酥脆椰奶米布丁杯，泰式街头甜点。
pro_tip: 在基底面糊中加入少量石灰水，确保外皮极为酥脆且持久不软。
ingredients: 150 g Rice Flour | 40 g Tapioca Starch | 600 ml Coconut Milk | 80 g Sugar | 0.5 tsp Salt | 3 whole Spring Onion | 80 g Corn
instructions: 将 rice flour、tapioca、一半 coconut milk 和 salt 混合成咸味面糊。| 将剩余 coconut milk 与 sugar 混合制成甜味顶料。| 加热 kanom krok pan，在每个杯中刷油。| 倒入一半咸味面糊，再倒入甜味顶料至满。| 加入少许 spring onion 或 corn 碎粒。| 盖上盖子，煮5分钟至边缘酥脆。(5 min) | 用勺子挖出，立即上桌。

name: 泰式青芒果沙拉
description: 青芒果沙拉，搭配虾米、花生和青柠汁。
pro_tip: 将 dried shrimp 和 peanuts 烘烤，以增强风味并确保酥脆的五星级口感。
ingredients: 2 whole Green Mango | 30 g Dried Shrimp | 60 g Peanuts | 3 whole Shallots | 2 whole Chilli | 3 tbsp Fish Sauce | 3 whole Lime | 2 tbsp Palm Sugar | 20 g Coriander
instructions: 将 green mango 切成细丝。| 在研钵中将 dried shrimp 与 chilli 和 shallots 粗捣。| 混合 fish sauce、lime 和 palm sugar。| 将 mango、虾米混合物和酱汁拌匀。| 顶部撒上 peanuts 和 coriander。

name: 炒粉丝
description: 炒 glass noodles，搭配鸡蛋、蔬菜和蚝油。
pro_tip: 用少量清汤为炒锅去渣，使酱汁乳化并均匀裹住粉丝。
ingredients: 300 g Glass Noodles | 3 whole Eggs | 300 g Chicken Breast | 1 whole Carrot | 2 stalks Celery | 4 whole Spring Onion | 3 cloves Garlic | 3 tbsp Oyster Sauce | 2 tbsp Soy Sauce | 1 tbsp Fish Sauce | 2 tbsp Oil
instructions: 将 glass noodles 在温水中浸泡10分钟，捞出沥干。(10 min) | 在热锅中爆香 garlic，加入 chicken，翻炒3分钟。(3 min) | 拨至一旁，在锅中央炒散 eggs。(2 min) | 加入 noodles、carrot 和 celery，大火翻炒。(3 min) | 用 oyster sauce、soy 和 fish sauce 调味。| 顶部撒上 spring onion。

name: 卡侬金
description: 泰式米线搭配椰奶咖喱酱和新鲜香草。
pro_tip: 加入捣碎的白鱼肉搅拌，以增稠酱汁并补充优质蛋白质。
ingredients: 300 g Rice Vermicelli | 400 ml Coconut Milk | 2 tbsp Green Curry Paste | 2 tbsp Fish Sauce | 1 tbsp Palm Sugar | 100 g Bean Sprouts | 100 g Long Beans | 20 g Basil | 2 whole Lime | 4 whole Hard Boiled Eggs
instructions: 煮熟 vermicelli，用冷水冲洗。| 将 coconut milk 顶部浓稠椰浆舀入热锅，在其中将 curry paste 炒2分钟。(2 min) | 加入剩余 coconut milk，用 fish sauce 和 palm sugar 调味。| 炖煮12分钟。(12 min) | 将 noodles 盛盘，顶部加上酱汁、bean sprouts、long beans、basil 和 lime。| 旁边放上对半切的煮 eggs。

name: 鸡肉提卡马萨拉
description: 腌制烤鸡配以浓郁、香辣的番茄奶油酱汁。
pro_tip: 最后加入烤过的Kasuri Methi，带来正宗的芳香风味。
ingredients: 700 g Chicken Thighs | 150 g Yoghurt | 3 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tsp Cumin | 2 tsp Coriander | 1 tsp Turmeric | 2 whole Onion | 5 cloves Garlic | 30 g Ginger | 400 g Canned Tomatoes | 150 ml Double Cream | 40 g Butter
instructions: 将yoghurt和一半香料混合，腌制chicken 2小时。(120 min) | 将chicken烤至表面焦香，静置后切块。 | 在黄油中翻炒onion、garlic和ginger至金黄色。(8 min) | 加入剩余香料和tomatoes，小火炖15分钟。(15 min) | 将酱汁搅拌顺滑，放回chicken并加入cream。 | 小火炖5分钟，配naan或米饭上桌。(5 min)

name: 黄油黑扁豆
description: 慢炖黑扁豆配黄油、奶油和温暖香料。
pro_tip: 加入干葫芦巴叶并用木炭烟熏收尾，提升整体风味层次。
ingredients: 250 g Black Lentils | 100 g Kidney Beans | 60 g Butter | 100 ml Cream | 1 whole Onion | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 3 tbsp Tomato Puree | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Cumin | 1 tsp Coriander | 2 whole Chilli
instructions: 将lentils和beans浸泡一夜，煮40分钟至软烂。(40 min) | 在butter中翻炒onion、garlic和ginger至金黄色。(8 min) | 加入香料和tomato puree，翻炒3分钟。(3 min) | 加入lentils和beans，极小火炖60分钟，频繁搅拌。(60 min) | 拌入cream和butter，配naan上桌。

name: 鸡肉香饭
description: 芳香的层叠米饭，配慢煮鸡肉、炸洋葱和藏红花。
pro_tip: 用少许玫瑰水替代部分ghee，增添花香尾韵，并搭配富含膳食纤维的沙拉享用。
ingredients: 400 g Basmati Rice | 800 g Chicken Thighs | 3 whole Onion | 200 g Yoghurt | 0.5 g Saffron | 4 tbsp Milk | 3 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tsp Cumin | 2 tsp Coriander | 1 tsp Turmeric | 60 g Ghee | 30 g Mint
instructions: 将chicken用yoghurt和香料腌制2小时。(120 min) | 在ghee中将onions炸至深金黄色且酥脆。(20 min) | 将腌好的chicken翻炒15分钟。(15 min) | 将rice预煮6分钟，沥干。(6 min) | 将rice和chicken层叠铺好，顶部加上saffron牛奶、炸onions和薄荷叶，密封锅盖。 | 极小火焖煮30分钟。(30 min)

name: 菠菜奶酪咖喱
description: 奶香浓郁的菠菜咖喱，配煎至金黄的新鲜印度奶酪块。
pro_tip: 去掉tomatoes可保留传统绿色风味，加少许柠檬汁可平衡浓郁感。
ingredients: 400 g Paneer | 800 g Spinach | 1 whole Onion | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 200 g Canned Tomatoes | 4 tbsp Double Cream | 3 tbsp Ghee | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Cumin | 0.5 tsp Turmeric
instructions: 在ghee中将paneer块煎至金黄，取出备用。(4 min) | 在同一锅中翻炒onion、garlic和ginger。(6 min) | 加入tomatoes和香料，翻炒5分钟。(5 min) | 将spinach炒软后粗略搅拌。 | 加入paneer和cream，小火炖5分钟。(5 min)

name: 黄油鸡
description: 嫩滑鸡肉配浓郁的番茄、黄油和奶油酱汁。
pro_tip: 最后加入冷藏黄油乳化，使酱汁呈现高光泽感并口感更加醇厚。
ingredients: 700 g Chicken Breasts | 80 g Butter | 1 whole Onion | 5 cloves Garlic | 30 g Ginger | 400 g Canned Tomatoes | 150 ml Double Cream | 3 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tsp Kashmiri Chilli | 1 tsp Fenugreek Leaves | 1 tbsp Honey | 100 g Yoghurt
instructions: 将chicken用yoghurt和香料腌制1小时。(60 min) | 将chicken烤或煎至表面焦香。(8 min) | 在butter中翻炒onion、garlic和ginger。(6 min) | 加入tomatoes和香料，炖15分钟后搅拌顺滑。(15 min) | 加入chicken、cream、honey和fenugreek，小火炖5分钟。(5 min)

name: 鹰嘴豆马萨拉
description: 香辣鹰嘴豆咖喱，配番茄、生姜和芒果粉。
pro_tip: 用少量水分次给洋葱锅底���釉，在不多用油的情况下加深美拉德反应。
ingredients: 800 g Chickpeas | 2 whole Onion | 400 g Canned Tomatoes | 4 cloves Garlic | 25 g Ginger | 2 tsp Cumin Seeds | 2 tsp Coriander | 1 tsp Turmeric | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Amchur | 3 tbsp Oil | 20 g Coriander Leaves
instructions: 在oil中将cumin seeds炸至爆裂。(1 min) | 加入onion、garlic和ginger，翻炒至金黄色。(7 min) | 加入tomatoes和所有香料，翻炒8分钟。(8 min) | 加入chickpeas和150毫升water，小火炖12分钟。(12 min) | 最后加入amchur，用coriander点缀。

name: 克什米尔红焖羊肉
description: 克什米尔风味慢炖羊肉，配芳香香料和酸奶底料。
pro_tip: 最后加入少许藏红花水和新鲜coriander，呈现餐厅级别的摆盘效果。
ingredients: 800 g Lamb Shoulder | 2 whole Onion | 200 g Yoghurt | 3 tsp Kashmiri Chilli | 2 tsp Coriander | 2 tsp Cumin | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 4 pods Cardamom | 1 stick Cinnamon | 2 whole Bay Leaves | 60 g Ghee | 5 cloves Garlic | 30 g Ginger
instructions: 将lamb分批在ghee中煎至上色。(8 min) | 翻炒onion、garlic、ginger和整粒香料。(6 min) | 加入研磨香料和yoghurt，翻炒5分钟。(5 min) | 放回lamb，加入200毫升water，盖盖焖煮55分钟。(55 min) | 配basmati rice和naan上桌。

name: 香料土豆花椰菜
description: 干炒香料土豆和花椰菜，配孜然和姜黄。
pro_tip: 将cauliflower和potatoes分别大火煎香后再合并，确保口感和美拉德反应的深度。
ingredients: 3 whole Potato | 1 whole Cauliflower | 1 whole Onion | 3 cloves Garlic | 15 g Ginger | 1 tsp Turmeric | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Coriander | 3 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander Leaves | 2 whole Green Chilli
instructions: 加热oil，放入cumin seeds至爆裂。 | 加入onion、garlic和ginger，翻炒5分钟。(5 min) | 加入香料、potato和cauliflower，充分翻炒均匀。 | 盖盖，中火焖煮20分钟至熟透。(20 min) | 用coriander和chilli点缀。

name: 菠菜扁豆汤
description: 黄扁豆和菠菜配芥末籽和生姜调味油。
pro_tip: 用草饲ghee替代普通食用油，最后挤入新鲜青柠汁，提亮扁豆的朴实风味。
ingredients: 250 g Yellow Lentils | 200 g Spinach | 1 whole Onion | 3 cloves Garlic | 15 g Ginger | 1 tsp Mustard Seeds | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds | 1 tsp Turmeric | 1 tsp Garam Masala | 3 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander Leaves | 2 whole Green Chilli
instructions: 将lentils加turmeric煮至软烂，约20分钟。(20 min) | 加热oil，爆香mustard和cumin seeds。 | 加入onion、garlic和ginger，翻炒5分钟。(5 min) | 加入spinach和chilli，翻炒至菜叶蔫软。 | 与lentils混合，淋上调味油并用coriander点缀。

name: 萨莫萨炸三角饺
description: 酥脆炸酥皮包裹香辣土豆和豌豆馅料。
pro_tip: 在面团中加入carom seeds，并在加入馅料前将whole cumin干炒出香。
ingredients: 300 g Flour | 3 whole Potato | 100 g Peas | 2 tsp Cumin Seeds | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Coriander | 2 whole Green Chilli | 20 g Coriander Leaves | 400 ml Oil | 2 tbsp Ghee | 1 tsp Amchur
instructions: 将flour、ghee和water混合揉成硬面团，静置30分钟。(30 min) | 将potatoes煮熟捣成泥，与peas、香料、chilli和coriander混合均匀。 | 将面团分份，擀开切成圆片，包入馅料并封成锥形。 | 在170°C的油中炸至金黄，约6分钟。(6 min)

name: Paneer Tikka
description: Marinated paneer grilled with peppers and onion on skewers.
pro_tip: Add roasted besan to the marinade for a professional crust and better spice adhesion.
ingredients: 400 g Paneer | 150 g Yoghurt | 2 tsp Kashmiri Chilli | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 0.5 tsp Turmeric | 2 whole Lemon | 1 whole Red Pepper | 1 whole Green Pepper | 1 whole Onion | 2 tbsp Oil
instructions: Mix yoghurt, spices and lemon. Coat paneer and vegetables. Marinate 1 hour. (60 min) | Thread onto skewers alternating paneer and vegetables. | Grill on high heat 10-12 min turning regularly. (12 min) | Serve with green chutney and sliced onion.

name: Lamb Keema
description: Spiced minced lamb with peas and warming spices - quick and satisfying.
pro_tip: Implement a 'tadka' start by blooming whole spices in ghee, and finish with a squeeze of lime and julienned ginger for acidity.
ingredients: 600 g Ground Lamb | 150 g Peas | 1 whole Onion | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 200 g Canned Tomatoes | 3 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tsp Cumin | 1 tsp Turmeric | 1 tsp Chilli Powder | 2 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander Leaves
instructions: Brown lamb in hot pan, breaking up. Drain excess fat. (5 min) | Add onion, garlic and ginger. Cook 5 min. (5 min) | Add spices and tomatoes. Simmer 12 min. (12 min) | Stir in peas. Cook 5 min. (5 min) | Garnish with coriander. Serve with roti or rice.

name: Bhel Puri
description: Mumbai street food - puffed rice with chutneys, onion and coriander.
pro_tip: Fold in chilled, diced boiled potatoes and pomegranate arils for structural variety and bright acidity.
ingredients: 150 g Puffed Rice | 80 g Sev | 1 whole Onion | 2 whole Tomatoes | 20 g Coriander Leaves | 4 tbsp Tamarind Chutney | 4 tbsp Mint Chutney | 2 tsp Chaat Masala | 2 whole Lemon | 1 whole Green Chilli
instructions: Mix puffed rice, sev, diced onion, tomato and coriander. | Add both chutneys, chaat masala and lemon juice. | Toss quickly - must be served within 2 minutes or it goes soggy. | Top with more sev and chilli.

name: Chole Bhature
description: Spiced chickpeas served with deep-fried puffy bread.
pro_tip: Infuse chickpeas with tea leaves and amchur for authentic color and tang.
ingredients: 800 g Chickpeas | 2 whole Onion | 3 whole Tomatoes | 5 cloves Garlic | 25 g Ginger | 300 g Flour | 60 g Yoghurt | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tsp Coriander | 1 tsp Cumin | 400 ml Oil
instructions: Make bhature dough: flour, yoghurt, salt. Knead. Rest 1 hour. (60 min) | Saute onion, garlic, ginger. Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 10 min. (10 min) | Add chickpeas and 200ml water. Simmer 15 min. (15 min) | Divide dough into 8. Roll round. | Deep fry at 180C until puffed and golden, 2 min. (2 min) | Serve hot with chole and pickled onion.

name: Malai Kofta
description: Fried paneer and potato dumplings in a rich cashew and cream gravy.
pro_tip: Double-strain the sauce for a velvet finish and add Kasuri Methi for aromatic depth.
ingredients: 250 g Paneer | 2 whole Potato | 80 g Cashews | 150 ml Cream | 2 whole Onion | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 400 g Canned Tomatoes | 3 tsp Garam Masala | 2 pods Cardamom | 400 ml Oil
instructions: Mash potato and paneer. Form into balls. Fry at 170C until golden. (5 min) | Blend cashews and cream to smooth paste. | Saute onion, garlic, ginger. Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 10 min. (10 min) | Add cashew cream. Simmer 8 min. (8 min) | Add kofta gently. Serve with rice or naan.

name: Pav Bhaji
description: Mumbai street-food mashed spiced vegetables served with buttery bread rolls.
pro_tip: Garnish with micro-coriander and pickled red onions to elevate the aesthetic and acid profile.
ingredients: 3 whole Potato | 200 g Cauliflower | 150 g Peas | 2 whole Onion | 3 whole Tomatoes | 4 cloves Garlic | 3 tbsp Pav Bhaji Masala | 80 g Butter | 8 whole Bread Rolls | 2 whole Lemon | 20 g Coriander
instructions: Boil potato, cauliflower and peas until very soft. Mash. (15 min) | Saute onion and garlic in butter until golden. (6 min) | Add tomatoes and pav bhaji masala. Cook 8 min. (8 min) | Add mashed vegetables. Mash together. Simmer 5 min. (5 min) | Toast rolls in butter. Serve bhaji topped with butter, coriander and lemon.

name: Masala Chai
description: Spiced Indian milk tea brewed with cardamom, ginger and cinnamon.
pro_tip: Halve the sugar and introduce a pinch of sea salt to brighten the cardamom.
ingredients: 500 ml Milk | 300 ml Water | 3 tbsp Black Tea | 6 pods Cardamom | 20 g Ginger | 1 stick Cinnamon | 4 whole Cloves | 4 tbsp Sugar | 0.25 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: Bruise cardamom pods. Simmer water with spices 3 min. (3 min) | Add tea. Simmer 2 min. (2 min) | Add milk and sugar. Bring to vigorous boil, then reduce. (3 min) | Simmer 3 min. Strain and serve.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Soft milk-powder dumplings soaked in rose and cardamom syrup.
pro_tip: Garnish with 24k gold leaf and serve with a cold, unsweetened saffron rabri to cut through the intense sweetness.
ingredients: 200 g Milk Powder | 60 g Flour | 0.5 tsp Baking Powder | 20 g Ghee | 80 ml Milk | 300 g Sugar | 2 tbsp Rose Water | 4 pods Cardamom | 400 ml Oil
instructions: Make syrup: boil sugar with 400ml water, cardamom and rose water 8 min. (8 min) | Mix milk powder, flour, baking powder and ghee. Add milk to form soft dough. | Roll into 12 balls. Fry at 160C turning gently until golden brown, 6 min. (6 min) | Immediately place in warm syrup. | Soak 30 min before serving. (30 min)

name: Dosa with Sambar
description: Crispy fermented rice and lentil crepes with spiced lentil soup.
pro_tip: Incorporate fenugreek seeds into the soak to improve batter elasticity and glycemic response.
ingredients: 500 g Dosa Batter | 200 g Toor Dal | 2 tbsp Tamarind | 2 whole Tomatoes | 1 whole Onion | 1 tsp Mustard Seeds | 10 whole Curry Leaves | 1 tsp Turmeric | 2 tbsp Sambar Powder | 3 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander
instructions: Make the dosa batter: soak 200g parboiled rice and 50g urad dal separately for 6 hrs. Blend each smooth. Mix together, add 1 tsp salt. Ferment at room temperature overnight until bubbly. Or use store-bought dosa batter. | Cook dal until soft. Add tomatoes, tamarind and sambar powder. Simmer 15 min. (15 min) | Make tarka: pop mustard seeds in oil with curry leaves. | Pour tarka into sambar. | Heat flat pan. Pour ladle of dosa batter. Spread thin. Cook until crispy, 3 min. (3 min) | Fold. Serve with sambar and coconut chutney.

name: Tandoori Prawns
description: Smoky charred prawns in yoghurt, tandoori spice and lemon.
pro_tip: Upgrade to jumbo U-10 prawns and marinate in mustard oil for an authentic, pungent smoky finish.
ingredients: 600 g Prawns | 150 g Yoghurt | 3 tbsp Tandoori Masala | 2 whole Lemon | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 2 tbsp Oil | 1 tsp Chaat Masala | 15 g Coriander
instructions: Mix yoghurt, tandoori masala, garlic, ginger and lemon. Marinate prawns 30 min. (30 min) | Thread onto skewers. | Grill on highest heat 3 min per side until charred. (6 min) | Sprinkle chaat masala and coriander. Serve with lemon.

name: Semolina Halwa
description: Semolina halwa with cardamom, saffron and cashews.
pro_tip: Increase ghee for a professional 'sheen' and garnish with silver leaf and toasted pistachios for visual impact.
ingredients: 200 g Semolina | 80 g Ghee | 150 g Sugar | 400 ml Water | 60 g Cashews | 40 g Raisins | 6 pods Cardamom | 0.25 g Saffron | 100 ml Milk
instructions: Dissolve saffron in warm milk. | Toast cashews in ghee. Add semolina. Roast until golden, 8 min. (8 min) | Carefully add hot water - it will splutter. Stir vigorously. (1 min) | Add sugar, saffron milk and cardamom. Stir until thick. (5 min) | Fold in raisins. Rest 2 min. (2 min)

name: Cucumber Raita
description: Cooling yoghurt with cucumber, cumin and fresh herbs.
pro_tip: Finish with a drizzle of tempered mustard oil and fresh pomegranate seeds for textural contrast and visual flair.
ingredients: 400 g Greek Yoghurt | 1 whole Cucumber | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds | 15 g Mint | 10 g Coriander | 0.5 tsp Salt | 0.25 tsp Chilli Powder | 0.5 tsp Sugar
instructions: Toast cumin seeds in dry pan until fragrant. Cool. Crush. (2 min) | Grate cucumber. Squeeze out liquid. | Mix yoghurt, cucumber, cumin, mint and coriander. | Season with salt, sugar and chilli powder. | Chill 30 min before serving. (30 min)

name: Bhindi Masala
description: Stir-fried okra with onion, tomato and spices - crispy, not slimy.
pro_tip: Switch to cold-pressed mustard oil for a traditional pungent depth.
ingredients: 500 g Okra | 2 whole Onion | 2 whole Tomatoes | 3 cloves Garlic | 15 g Ginger | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds | 0.5 tsp Turmeric | 1 tsp Coriander | 1 tsp Amchur | 3 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander Leaves
instructions: Wash and dry okra. Cut into 2cm pieces. | Fry okra in oil without stirring until slightly crispy, 8 min. (8 min) | Add cumin, onion, garlic and ginger. Cook 5 min. (5 min) | Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 5 min. (5 min) | Top with amchur and coriander.

name: Dum Aloo
description: Baby potatoes in a tangy, spiced yoghurt and tomato gravy.
pro_tip: Introduce a 'Dhungar' smoking technique with hot charcoal and ghee to provide signature depth.
ingredients: 600 g Baby Potatoes | 150 g Yoghurt | 2 whole Onion | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 300 g Canned Tomatoes | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Fennel Seeds | 2 whole Chilli | 4 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander
instructions: Prick and fry potatoes until golden. Set aside. (8 min) | Saute onion, garlic and ginger. | Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 8 min. (8 min) | Whisk yoghurt. Add off heat. Return to low heat. | Add potatoes. Cover and simmer 15 min. (15 min) | Garnish with coriander.

name: Mutter Paneer
description: Peas and paneer in a spiced onion-tomato gravy.
pro_tip: Incorporate crushed kasuri methi at the finish for essential floral notes and a signature restaurant aroma.
ingredients: 300 g Paneer | 200 g Peas | 2 whole Onion | 3 whole Tomatoes | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 1 tsp Cumin | 0.5 tsp Turmeric | 4 tbsp Cream | 3 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander
instructions: Pan-fry paneer cubes until golden. Set aside. (3 min) | Saute onion, garlic and ginger until deep golden. (8 min) | Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 8 min. (8 min) | Add paneer and peas. Simmer 8 min. (8 min) | Finish with cream and coriander.

name: Seekh Kebab
description: Spiced minced chicken grilled on skewers.
pro_tip: Introduce smoked paprika or a charcoal 'dhungar' technique to replicate authentic Tandoor depth.
ingredients: 600 g Ground Chicken | 1 whole Onion | 4 cloves Garlic | 20 g Ginger | 2 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tsp Coriander | 1 tsp Cumin | 2 whole Chilli | 20 g Coriander Leaves | 1 whole Egg | 2 tbsp Oil
instructions: Blend onion, garlic, ginger and chilli. Squeeze out excess water. | Mix with chicken, spices, coriander and egg. | Wrap around flat metal skewers. Chill 30 min. (30 min) | Grill 12 min turning regularly. (12 min) | Serve with naan, raita and sliced onion.

name: Mango Lassi
description: Chilled yoghurt and mango drink with cardamom.
pro_tip: Replace sugar with honey or jaggery to elevate the fruit's natural profile.
ingredients: 400 g Greek Yoghurt | 1 whole Mango | 100 ml Cold Water | 2 tbsp Sugar | 2 pods Cardamom | 200 g Ice | 0.5 tbsp Rose Water
instructions: Grind cardamom seeds finely. | Blend yoghurt, mango, water, sugar, cardamom and ice until frothy. (2 min) | Pour into chilled glasses. | A pinch of rose water on top is optional.

name: Rice Kheer
description: Slow-cooked rice pudding with saffron, cardamom and pistachios.
pro_tip: Consider reducing the milk further for a thicker, rabri-style finish.
ingredients: 100 g Basmati Rice | 1 l Milk | 80 g Sugar | 0.25 g Saffron | 4 pods Cardamom | 40 g Pistachios | 1 tbsp Rose Water | 30 g Almonds
instructions: Soak rice 30 min. Drain. (30 min) | Bring milk to boil. Add rice. Simmer 30 min stirring frequently. (30 min) | Add sugar, saffron and cardamom. Cook 8 min. (8 min) | Stir in rose water. | Serve warm or chilled, topped with pistachios and almonds.

name: Paneer Bhurji
description: Scrambled paneer with tomatoes, onion and spices.
pro_tip: Substitute oil with ghee and finish with Kasuri Methi and lemon juice for aromatic complexity.
ingredients: 300 g Paneer | 1 whole Onion | 2 whole Tomatoes | 2 whole Green Chilli | 2 cloves Garlic | 10 g Ginger | 0.5 tsp Turmeric | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds | 1 tsp Garam Masala | 2 tbsp Oil | 15 g Coriander Leaves
instructions: Heat oil. Pop cumin seeds. | Add onion, garlic, ginger and chilli. Cook 5 min. (5 min) | Add tomatoes and spices. Cook 5 min. (5 min) | Crumble paneer in. Stir on high heat 3 min. (3 min) | Garnish with coriander. Serve with roti or toast.

name: Aloo Paratha
description: Flaky whole wheat flatbread stuffed with spiced mashed potato.
pro_tip: Add a squeeze of lemon or pomegranate powder to the filling to brighten the palate.
ingredients: 300 g Whole Wheat Flour | 3 whole Potato | 2 whole Green Chilli | 1 tsp Cumin Seeds | 1 tsp Garam Masala | 20 g Coriander Leaves | 15 g Ginger | 1 tsp Salt | 60 g Ghee | 200 g Yoghurt
instructions: Mix flour, salt and water into soft dough. Rest 20 min. (20 min) | Boil potatoes. Mash with chilli, cumin, garam masala, ginger and coriander. | Divide dough. Flatten. Fill with potato. Seal. Roll out gently. | Cook on tawa with ghee until golden spots appear, 3 min per side. (6 min) | Serve with cold yoghurt and pickle.

name: 经典��压汉堡
description: 多汁碾压汉堡，搭配美式芝士、酸黄瓜和秘制酱料。
pro_tip: 改用干式熟成牛肉混合馅，并以高融点熟成切达芝士替代加工芝士。
ingredients: 700 g Ground Beef | 4 slices American Cheese | 4 whole Burger Buns | 1 whole Onion | 60 g Pickles | 4 leaves Iceberg Lettuce | 2 whole Tomato | 3 tbsp Ketchup | 2 tbsp Mustard | 3 tbsp Mayo | 1 tsp Salt
instructions: 将牛肉分成4等份球状（每份约120克），临下锅前用盐和胡椒粉充分调味。 | 大火加热铸铁锅3分钟至冒烟，放入牛肉球，用铲子用力压扁，静置烹饪90秒。(3 min) | 翻面，加cheese，再煎60秒。(1 min) | 调制秘制酱料：混合mayo、ketchup和mustard。 | 将buns切面朝下放入锅中的burger油脂中烤1分钟，依次铺上酱料、lettuce、tomato、双层smash patty、pickles和onion。(1 min)

name: 芝士通心粉
description: 三种芝士白酱烤elbow pasta，表面覆盖金黄酥脆面包糠。
pro_tip: 将milk与bay leaf和garlic一同浸泡，在不增加额外脂肪的情况下增添香气层次。
ingredients: 350 g Elbow Pasta | 60 g Butter | 60 g Flour | 700 ml Milk | 250 g Cheddar | 100 g Gruyere | 60 g Parmesan | 80 g Panko Breadcrumbs | 1 tsp Dijon Mustard | 0.25 tsp Cayenne
instructions: 将pasta煮至弹牙，沥干。 | 制作白酱：融化butter，加入flour搅拌，倒入milk，煮5分钟。(5 min) | 加入mustard、cayenne和四分之三的cheeses，搅拌至顺滑。 | 将pasta与酱料混合，倒入烤盘。 | 撒上剩余cheese和panko。 | 在190°C下烤20分钟，至表面金黄冒泡。(20 min)

name: 新英格兰蛤蜊浓汤
description: 浓郁的土豆蛤蜊汤，搭配烟熏bacon。
pro_tip: 改用Yukon Gold potatoes以获得更好的淀粉融合度，最后加入少许白胡椒和Sherry vinegar提亮口感。
ingredients: 500 g Clams | 150 g Smoked Bacon | 3 whole Potato | 1 whole Onion | 3 stalks Celery | 40 g Butter | 40 g Flour | 200 ml Cream | 300 ml Milk | 3 sprigs Thyme | 2 whole Bay Leaves
instructions: 蒸clams至开口，保留汤汁，取出蛤蜊肉。(8 min) | 将bacon煎至酥脆，加入onion和celery翻炒。(5 min) | 加入flour搅拌，倒入clam liquor、milk和cream，搅拌至浓稠。(5 min) | 加入potato和thyme，小火炖15分钟。(15 min) | 加入clam meat，调味，搭配oyster crackers上桌。

name: 鸡肉派
description: 酥脆千层酥皮馅饼，内馅为鸡肉、蔬菜和奶油酱汁。可使用市售puff pastry，或自制：将butter折叠入面团中，共折叠6次，每次之间需冷藏静置。
pro_tip: 以去除多余脂肪的鸡腿肉替代鸡胸肉，并用white wine烹锅底精华以增添酸度。
ingredients: 600 g Chicken Breast | 400 g Puff Pastry | 2 whole Carrot | 150 g Peas | 3 stalks Celery | 1 whole Onion | 60 g Butter | 60 g Flour | 500 ml Chicken Broth | 100 ml Cream | 4 sprigs Thyme | 1 whole Egg
instructions: 煮熟并切碎chicken，用butter将onion、carrot和celery翻炒出香味。(8 min) | 加入flour翻炒，倒入broth和cream，小火煮8分钟。(8 min) | 加入chicken、peas和thyme，调味。 | 倒入派盘，盖上pastry，捏紧边缘。 | 刷上egg液，在200°C下烤30分钟。(30 min)

name: 水牛城鸡翅
description: 酥脆烤鸡翅裹上黄油辣酱。
pro_tip: 将冷butter在离火后加入hot sauce中搅打，形成稳定乳化液，使酱料更好地挂附在鸡翅上。
ingredients: 1 kg Chicken Wings | 100 ml Hot Sauce | 60 g Butter | 2 tsp Garlic Powder | 1 tsp Onion Powder | 2 tsp Baking Powder | 1 tsp Salt | 4 stalks Celery | 150 g Blue Cheese Dip
instructions: 将wings与baking powder、salt和garlic powder拌匀。 | 在220°C的烤架上烤40分钟，中途翻面。(40 min) | 融化butter，与hot sauce混合。 | 将热鸡翅裹上酱料。 | 搭配celery sticks和blue cheese dip上桌。

name: 手撕猪肉三明治
description: 烟熏慢煮猪肩肉搭配自制coleslaw，夹在松软面包中。
pro_tip: 改用干式腌制24小时以提升嫩度，并通过liquid smoke或柴火烤箱增添烟熏风味。
ingredients: 1.5 kg Pork Shoulder | 3 tbsp Paprika | 3 tbsp Brown Sugar | 2 tsp Garlic Powder | 2 tsp Onion Powder | 1 tsp Cayenne | 200 ml BBQ Sauce | 6 whole Brioche Buns | 400 g Cabbage | 2 whole Carrot | 150 g Mayo | 3 tbsp Apple Cider Vinegar
instructions: 将香料混合成rub，充分涂抹在pork上，冷藏过夜。(480 min) | 放入slow cooker低温档煮8小时，或在250°C烤箱中烤4小时。(480 min) | 用叉子将pork撕碎，拌入BBQ sauce。 | 制作coleslaw：将cabbage和carrot与mayo、vinegar和salt拌匀。 | 将猪肉堆在buns上，搭配coleslaw。

name: 班尼迪克蛋
description: 水波蛋搭配English muffins、Canadian bacon和荷兰酱。
pro_tip: 最后以Maldon sea salt和微型香草点缀，而非普通chives，以提升视觉和口感层次。
ingredients: 8 whole Eggs | 8 slices Canadian Bacon | 4 whole English Muffins | 4 whole Egg Yolks | 150 g Butter | 1 whole Lemon | 2 tbsp White Vinegar | 0.5 tsp Salt | 10 g Chives | 0.25 tsp Cayenne
instructions: 制作hollandaise：在微沸热水上方搅打egg yolks，缓缓加入融化的butter搅打均匀，加入lemon汁和cayenne。(8 min) | 在宽口锅中加入vinegar，将水烧至微沸。 | 搅动水形成漩涡，逐一放入eggs，水波煮3分钟。(3 min) | 烤好muffins，加热bacon。 | 依次叠放：muffin、bacon、egg、hollandaise，撒上chives。

name: 酪乳松饼
description: 蓬松酪乳松饼，搭配枫糖浆和黄油。
pro_tip: 在松饼表面撒一小撮fleur de sel，与枫糖浆的甜味形成对比。
ingredients: 300 g Flour | 2 tsp Baking Powder | 0.5 tsp Baking Soda | 3 tbsp Sugar | 0.5 tsp Salt | 360 ml Buttermilk | 2 whole Eggs | 60 g Butter | 1 tsp Vanilla | 80 ml Maple Syrup
instructions: 将flour、sugar、baking powder、baking soda和salt混合搅拌，另取一碗将buttermilk、eggs、melted butter和vanilla打匀。 | 将湿料折入干料中，面糊有颗粒感即可。 | 将煎锅预热至中温（约175°C），轻涂butter，倒入四分之一杯面糊，煮至表面出现气泡、边缘凝固，约2分钟。(2 min) | 翻面，再煎1分钟至底面金黄。剩余面糊以同样方式煎制（通常共4至5批），其余松饼可放入90°C烤箱保温。(1 min) | 叠放后立即搭配maple syrup和冷butter上桌。

name: 凯撒沙拉
description: 酥脆romaine、parmesan和蒜香凯撒酱搭配croutons。
pro_tip: 用切开的garlic瓣涂抹沙拉碗以增添香气，并只使用romaine菜心以获得最佳脆度。
ingredients: 2 heads Romaine Lettuce | 80 g Parmesan | 200 g Sourdough Bread | 2 whole Egg Yolks | 2 cloves Garlic | 4 whole Anchovy Fillets | 1 tsp Dijon Mustard | 2 whole Lemon | 1 tsp Worcestershire Sauce | 120 ml Olive Oil | 1 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: 将bread撕成小块，与oil和garlic拌匀，在190°C下烤12分钟。(12 min) | 将egg yolks、anchovies、garlic、mustard、lemon汁和Worcestershire搅打均匀。 | 缓缓加入olive oil搅打乳化，充分调味。 | 将lettuce撕碎��与酱料和Parmesan拌匀。 | 撒上croutons和额外的Parmesan。

name: 辣椒肉酱
description: 烟熏牛肉辣椒配kidney beans、chipotle和黑啤酒。
pro_tip: 最后加入少许apple cider vinegar，以提亮厚重的油脂感并平衡烟熏味。
ingredients: 800 g Ground Beef | 400 g Kidney Beans | 800 g Canned Tomatoes | 2 whole Onion | 5 cloves Garlic | 2 tbsp Chipotle in Adobo | 330 ml Dark Beer | 3 tsp Cumin | 2 tsp Paprika | 2 tsp Chilli Powder | 30 g Dark Chocolate | 150 g Sour Cream
instructions: 将beef煎至上色，沥去多余油脂。 | 翻炒onion和garlic，加入香料，炒3分钟。(3 min) | 加入beef、tomatoes、chipotle和beer，煮沸。(3 min) | 小火炖45分钟，加入beans，再煮10分钟。(55 min) | 拌入chocolate，调味。 | 搭配sour cream、cheddar和cornbread上桌。

name: 龙虾��
description: 新英格兰风格冷龙虾沙拉，夹入涂有黄油的顶开式面包卷中。
pro_tip: 改用柠檬黄油乳化酱以提升风味层次，并选用高品质布里欧修面包卷。
ingredients: 600 g Lobster Tails | 80 g Mayo | 2 stalks Celery | 15 g Chives | 2 whole Lemon | 4 whole Split-Top Rolls | 40 g Butter | 0.5 tsp Salt | 0.25 tsp White Pepper
instructions: 蒸或煮lobster tails 6分钟，冷却。(6 min) | 取出虾肉，切成块状。 | 与mayo、切丁celery、chives、lemon、盐和胡椒混合。 | 在平底锅中涂上黄油，将rolls煎至金黄色。(3 min) | 填入龙虾沙拉，搭配lemon和chips上桌。

name: 法式蘸汁牛肉三明治
description: 薄切烤牛肉夹入烤热的hoagie面包，搭配浓郁的肉汁蘸食。
pro_tip: 用雪利酒为洋葱锅底脱糖增香，并升级为48小时浓缩小牛骨汤。
ingredients: 500 g Roast Beef | 600 ml Beef Broth | 4 whole Hoagie Rolls | 8 slices Provolone | 1 whole Onion | 30 g Butter | 2 cloves Garlic | 3 sprigs Thyme | 1 tbsp Worcestershire Sauce
instructions: （烤牛肉做法：将500g sirloin用盐和胡椒调味，在200°C烤25分钟至五分熟，静置20分钟后切薄片。也可使用优质熟食店的roast beef。）将onion在butter中炒至焦糖化，约15分钟。(15 min) | 将broth与garlic、thyme和Worcestershire一起炖煮10分钟。(10 min) | 将roast beef短暂放入broth中加热。 | 烤热rolls，依次铺上beef、onion和provolone。 | 搭配单独盛放的au jus蘸汁上桌。

name: 酪乳炸鸡
description: 风味浓郁的酥脆炸鸡，用酪乳腌制一夜而成。
pro_tip: 最后淋上蜂蜜黄油或��上芹菜盐，以提升整体风味层次。
ingredients: 1.2 kg Chicken Pieces | 500 ml Buttermilk | 300 g Flour | 3 tsp Paprika | 2 tsp Garlic Powder | 2 tsp Onion Powder | 1 tsp Cayenne | 2 tsp Salt | 2 tsp Black Pepper | 1 l Oil
instructions: 将chicken浸泡在加盐的buttermilk中过夜腌制。(480 min) | 将flour与paprika、garlic powder、onion、cayenne、盐和胡椒混合。 | 将chicken裹上flour，静置15分钟后再裹一次。(15 min) | 在165°C油温下炸至金黄熟透，约12至15分钟。(14 min) | 放在网架上沥油，立即调味。

name: 蓝莓松饼
description: 烘焙坊风格的高挺松饼，饱含新鲜蓝莓。
pro_tip: 最后撒上柠檬百里香酥粒或珍珠糖，以呈现精致餐厅所追求的口感对比。
ingredients: 350 g Flour | 200 g Sugar | 2 tsp Baking Powder | 0.5 tsp Salt | 2 whole Eggs | 200 ml Milk | 120 ml Oil | 2 tsp Vanilla | 300 g Blueberries | 2 tsp Lemon Zest
instructions: 混合干性原料：flour、sugar、baking powder、盐、lemon zest。 | 搅打eggs、milk、oil和vanilla。 | 将湿性原料轻拌入干性原料中至刚好混合，再拌入blueberries。 | 将面糊填入muffin cups至四分之三满。 | 在200°C烤22分钟。(22 min)

name: 费城芝士牛肉三明治
description: 薄切ribeye牛肉、焦糖洋葱和Provolone芝士夹入烤热的hoagie面包中。
pro_tip: 用牛油脂代替黄油，以增强风味并承受更高的煎烤温度。
ingredients: 600 g Beef Ribeye | 2 whole Onion | 200 g Provolone | 4 whole Hoagie Rolls | 30 g Butter | 1 tsp Salt | 1 tsp Pepper | 2 tsp Worcestershire Sauce | 1 whole Green Pepper
instructions: 将steak冷冻30分钟，切成极薄片。(30 min) | 在butter中将onions焦糖化，约12分钟。(12 min) | 在烧至极热的铁板上煎beef，约3分钟。(3 min) | 加入onions和pepper，将cheese铺在上面，让其融化。(1 min) | 铲入切开并烤热的hoagie rolls中。

name: 香蕉面包
description: 口感扎实湿润的香蕉面包，含有核桃和深色红糖。
pro_tip: 将50g butter替换为焦化黄油，以增添深厚的坚果香气，并加入一汤匙dark rum来提升香草风味。
ingredients: 3 whole Bananas | 240 g Flour | 100 g Butter | 150 g Brown Sugar | 2 whole Eggs | 1 tsp Baking Soda | 0.5 tsp Salt | 1 tsp Vanilla | 80 g Walnuts | 1 tsp Cinnamon
instructions: 将bananas充分捣烂。 | 将软化的butter和sugar打至颜色变浅且蓬松，逐个打入eggs，再加入vanilla。 | 拌入bananas。 | 轻拌入flour、baking soda、盐和cinnamon。 | 拌入walnuts，倒入loaf tin中。 | 在175°C烤55至60分钟。(58 min)

name: 巧克力豆饼干
description: 经典焦化黄油巧克力豆饼干，边缘酥脆，中心软糯。
pro_tip: 最后撒上片状海盐，以平衡甜度并突出巧克力风味。
ingredients: 280 g Flour | 220 g Butter | 200 g Brown Sugar | 100 g White Sugar | 2 whole Eggs | 2 tsp Vanilla | 1 tsp Baking Soda | 1 tsp Salt | 300 g Chocolate Chips
instructions: 将butter焦化至散发坚果香，冷却20分钟。(20 min) | 将butter和sugars打匀，加入eggs和vanilla。 | 轻拌入flour、baking soda和盐。 | 拌入chocolate chips。 | 将面团冷藏30分钟。(30 min) | 挖球放在烤盘上，在190°C烤11至12分钟。(12 min)

name: 青柠派
description: 浓郁爽口的青柠馅料盛入全麦饼干底中。
pro_tip: 在饼干底中加入少许海盐以平衡甜度，并使用马斯卡彭稳定的奶油以获得更奢华的���感。
ingredients: 200 g Graham Crackers | 80 g Butter | 3 tbsp Sugar | 4 whole Egg Yolks | 120 ml Key Lime Juice | 400 g Condensed Milk | 2 tbsp Lime Zest | 200 ml Cream
instructions: 将crackers与butter和sugar混合压碎，压入tart tin中，烤10分钟。(10 min) | 将egg yolks打至颜色变浅，拌入condensed milk、lime juice和zest。 | 倒入饼干底中，在175°C烤15分钟。(15 min) | 冷却后冷藏2小时。(120 min) | 打发cream，上桌前铺在派上。

name: 南方玉米面包
description: 略带甜味、质地酥松的南方玉米面包，在铸铁平底锅中烘烤而成。
pro_tip: 用焦化黄油代替普通黄油以增添更深层的复杂香气，并拌入打发的蛋白以获得更轻盈的米其林标准口感。
ingredients: 200 g Cornmeal | 100 g Flour | 3 tbsp Sugar | 2 tsp Baking Powder | 1 tsp Salt | 2 whole Eggs | 300 ml Buttermilk | 80 g Butter
instructions: 将cast iron skillet在200°C预热10分钟。(10 min) | 在热锅中融化butter。 | 混合干性原料，加入eggs、buttermilk和大部分butter搅拌均匀。 | 倒入热锅中。 | 在200°C烤22分钟至金黄色并从边缘脱离。(22 min)

name: 牛肉辣酱热狗
description: 纯牛肉热狗上铺满辣肉酱、切达芝士和切丁洋葱。
pro_tip: 用黑啤或世涛啤酒为辣酱锅底脱糖增香，以增添麦芽深度和精致的苦味层次。
ingredients: 8 whole Hot Dogs | 8 whole Hot Dog Buns | 300 g Ground Beef | 400 g Canned Tomatoes | 200 g Kidney Beans | 2 whole Onion | 2 tsp Cumin | 2 tsp Chilli Powder | 100 g Cheddar | 2 tbsp Yellow Mustard
instructions: 将beef与一半onion一起炒香，加入cumin和chilli powder。(4 min) | 加入tomatoes和beans，炖煮15分钟。(15 min) | 烤或煮hot dogs。 | 烤热buns。 | 依次铺上hot dog、chili、生onion、cheddar和mustard。

name: 鸡肉��撒卷
description: 烤鸡肉、爽脆罗马生菜和帕尔马干酪裹入温热的面粉薄饼中。
pro_tip: 用菠菜薄饼代替普通薄饼以增加微量营养素，并用希腊酸奶代替部分酱汁以减少脂肪含量，同时保持浓郁口感。
ingredients: 500 g Chicken Breasts | 1 head Romaine Lettuce | 60 g Parmesan | 4 whole Flour Tortillas | 100 ml Caesar Dressing | 60 g Croutons | 1 whole Lemon | 1 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: （市售面粉薄饼即可。如需自制：将240g flour、½ tsp salt、1 tsp baking powder、2 tbsp lard、140ml warm water混合揉成面团，醒发30分钟，擀薄后在干锅上每面烙1分钟。）给chicken调味，烤每面4分钟至熟透。(8 min) | 静置后切片。 | 将romaine与dressing、Parmesan和croutons拌匀。 | 将tortillas加热。 | 在每张饼中放入chicken和沙拉，卷起后即可上桌。

name: 纽约芝士蛋糕
description: 以全麦饼干为底，质地浓密细腻的烤制芝士蛋糕，表面覆盖一层酸奶油。

description: 奶香四溢的四种芝士通心粉在铸铁锅中烟熏而成。
pro_tip: 用shallots和peppercorns浸泡milk，打造更具层次感的香气底味。
ingredients: 350 g Elbow Pasta | 200 g Cheddar | 100 g Gruyere | 100 g Cream Cheese | 60 g Parmesan | 60 g Butter | 60 g Flour | 600 ml Milk | 60 g Panko | 2 tsp Smoked Paprika
instructions: 将pasta煮至有嚼劲。沥干。| 制作bechamel酱。加入cheeses搅拌至顺滑。| 将pasta和酱汁混合。倒入cast iron skillet中。| 撒上panko和paprika。| 放入135C的烟熏炉中烟熏45分钟，直至表面金黄并带有烟熏香气。(45 min)

name: 牙买加香辣鸡
description: 用Scotch bonnet腌制的鸡肉在多香果木上烧烤而成。
pro_tip: 使用pimento wood chips以实现正宗烟熏风味，并用coconut aminos代替soy以减少钠含量。
ingredients: 1.2 kg Chicken Pieces | 3 whole Scotch Bonnet | 6 cloves Garlic | 30 g Ginger | 6 whole Spring Onion | 2 tbsp Allspice | 1 tsp Cinnamon | 0.5 tsp Nutmeg | 6 sprigs Thyme | 3 tbsp Soy Sauce | 2 tbsp Brown Sugar | 3 whole Lime
instructions: 将所有腌料食材搅拌至顺滑。| 在chicken上深划几刀。涂抹jerk marinade。腌制过夜。(480 min) | 用中火烤，边翻面边涂抹酱汁，烤40至45分钟直至全熟。(43 min) | 静置5分钟。(5 min) | 配rice and peas和festival dumplings上桌。

name: 阿拉巴马白酱
description: 阿拉巴马风格白色烧烤酱——奶香浓郁、酸爽、带胡椒辛香。
pro_tip: 使用粗磨烟熏黑胡椒，以强化烧烤的木火风味。
ingredients: 250 g Mayo | 80 ml Apple Cider Vinegar | 2 tbsp Horseradish | 1 tbsp Dijon Mustard | 2 tsp Black Pepper | 1 tsp Garlic Powder | 1 tsp Sugar | 0.5 tsp Salt | 2 tbsp Lemon Juice
instructions: 将所有食材搅拌均匀。| 品尝并调整调味。| 冷藏至少1小时后再上桌。(60 min) | 非常适合作为烟熏chicken的蘸酱，或淋在pulled pork上食用。

name: 烟熏��胸肉玉米饼
description: 剩余烟熏牛胸肉配温热玉米饼、萨尔萨酱和腌制墨西哥辣椒。
pro_tip: 用发酵酸橙萝卜奶油代替酸奶油，以提升酸度层次。
ingredients: 400 g Smoked Brisket | 12 whole Corn Tortillas | 60 g Pickled Jalapeños | 20 g Coriander | 1 whole Onion | 150 ml Salsa Verde | 2 whole Lime | 2 whole Avocado | 100 g Sour Cream
instructions: （关于烟熏牛胸肉的做法：请参阅BBQ目录中的完整烟熏牛胸肉食谱——在120°C下烟熏整块brisket flat 10至12小时。这款玉米饼是处理剩余brisket的完美方式。）将brisket用锡纸包裹，加入少量beef broth加热。(5 min) | 直接在火焰上加热tortillas。 | 将brisket切片或切碎。 | 在tortillas上铺上brisket、切丁onion和jalapeños。 | 加入salsa、coriander、avocado和sour cream，挤上lime汁。

name: 蜜桃BBQ釉汁火腿
description: 整只烟熏火腿，涂抹蜜桃果酱和红糖釉汁。
pro_tip: 最后用高温炙烤，打造酥脆外壳，同时保持内部鲜嫩多汁。
ingredients: 3 kg Smoked Ham | 200 g Peach Preserves | 80 g Brown Sugar | 3 tbsp Dijon Mustard | 3 tbsp Apple Cider Vinegar | 0.5 tsp Cayenne | 0.5 tsp Ground Cloves | 1 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: 在ham表面切出1厘米深的菱形花纹。 | 将peach preserves、brown sugar、mustard、vinegar、cayenne和香料混合均匀。 | 将ham放入烤盘，刷上三分之一釉汁。 | 在160°C下烘烤90分钟，每30分钟刷一次釉汁。(90 min) | 静置15分钟。(15 min) | 切片，搭配剩余温热釉汁上桌。

name: 烟熏牛肋骨
description: 巨大的牛小排，烟熏6小时直至肉骨分离。
pro_tip: 用高品质精制盐和腌制红洋葱点缀成品，平衡油脂的丰腴感。
ingredients: 2 kg Beef Short Ribs | 3 tbsp Coarse Salt | 3 tbsp Black Pepper | 2 tbsp Garlic Powder | 400 g Oak Wood Chips | 200 ml Beef Broth
instructions: 修去多余脂肪，均匀涂抹50/50的salt和pepper混合料。 | 在室温下静置1小时。(60 min) | 肉面朝上在110°C下烟熏6小时。(360 min) | 每小时用beef broth喷洒一次。(60 min) | 当表皮变深且温度达到98°C时，放入保温箱静置1小时。(60 min) | 沿骨缝切开，搭配pickles和white bread上桌。

name: 烤裙边牛排
description: 经奇米丘里酱腌制的裙边牛排，在高温下烧烤而成。
pro_tip: 烧烤前将牛排回温至室温，确保受热均匀。
ingredients: 700 g Skirt Steak | 40 g Parsley | 10 g Oregano | 4 cloves Garlic | 60 ml Red Wine Vinegar | 100 ml Olive Oil | 2 whole Red Chilli | 2 tsp Salt | 1 tsp Cumin
instructions: 制作chimichurri：将parsley、oregano、garlic、vinegar、oil、chilli、salt和cumin混合搅打。 | 用一半chimichurri腌制steak 30分钟。(30 min) | 在最高火力下每面烤3分钟至五分熟。(6 min) | 静置5分钟。(5 min) | 逆纹切薄片，搭配剩余chimichurri上桌。

name: 炉主豆

ingredients: 500 g Pinto Beans | 200 g Smoked Brisket Fat Trimmings | 2 whole Onion | 6 cloves Garlic | 2 tbsp Chipotle in Adobo | 3 tbsp Tomato Puree | 3 tbsp Brown Sugar | 3 tbsp Apple Cider Vinegar | 1 tbsp Salt | 2 tsp Cumin
instructions: （本食谱专为在烟熏炉中放于brisket下方烹制而设计，吸收滴落的油脂。Fat trimmings来自处理整块brisket——请参阅BBQ目录中的烟熏牛胸肉食谱。）将beans浸泡过夜。(480 min) | 在铸铁Dutch oven中将brisket trimmings煸出油脂。(10 min) | 加入onion和garlic，翻炒5分钟。(5 min) | 加入所有剩余食材和beans，加水没过。 | 在135°C的烟熏炉中放于brisket下方烹制3小时，吸收滴落油脂。(180 min) | 调味后搭配brisket上桌。

name: 烟熏鸭腿
description: 鸭腿以五香粉慢熏，配蜂蜜釉汁。
pro_tip: 烟熏后快速煎制或用喷枪炙烤鸭皮，以获得不可或缺的酥脆口感对比。
ingredients: 4 whole Duck Legs | 2 tsp Five Spice | 4 tbsp Honey | 3 tbsp Soy Sauce | 25 g Ginger | 4 cloves Garlic | 3 tbsp Rice Vinegar | 1 tsp Salt | 200 g Cherry Wood Chips
instructions: 在duck皮上划刀，将five spice和salt混合后均匀涂抹于duck上。 | 将honey、soy、ginger、garlic和vinegar混合制成釉汁。 | 使用cherry wood在120°C下烟熏duck 2.5小时。(150 min) | 每40分钟刷一次釉汁。 | 静置10分钟。(10 min) | 搭配蒸bok choy和jasmine rice上桌。

name: 烟熏鳟鱼蘸酱
description: 烟熏鳟鱼碎与奶油芝士、辣根和莳萝混合而成的蘸酱。

ingredients: 300 g Smoked Trout | 200 g Cream Cheese | 80 g Sour Cream | 2 tbsp Horseradish | 20 g Dill | 2 whole Lemon | 2 tbsp Capers | 4 whole Spring Onion | 1 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: 将trout剥碎，去除所有骨头。 | 将cream cheese和sour cream搅打至顺滑。 | 拌入trout、horseradish、dill、lemon、capers和spring onion。 | 用black pepper调味。 | 搭配crackers或cucumber片上桌。

name: 蜂蜜芥末釉汁猪排
description: 厚切猪排烧烤后淋上蜂蜜芥末釉汁。
pro_tip: 将猪排在苹果醋腌制液中浸泡四小时，确保达到米其林级别的水分保留和调味渗透。
ingredients: 4 whole Pork Chops | 3 tbsp Honey | 3 tbsp Dijon Mustard | 2 tbsp Whole Grain Mustard | 2 tbsp Apple Cider Vinegar | 2 tsp Garlic Powder | 3 sprigs Rosemary | 1 tsp Salt | 1 tsp Black Pepper
instructions: 用garlic powder、salt和pepper为chops调味。 | 将honey、两种mustard和vinegar混合均匀。 | 在高温下将chops每面烤4分钟。(8 min) | 移至间接热区，刷上釉汁，再烤5分钟。(5 min) | 静置5分钟，刷上剩余釉汁，搭配rosemary上桌。

name: 烟熏奶酪蘸酱
description: 烟熏融化奶酪蘸酱，加入罐装番茄和墨西哥辣椒。
pro_tip: 用火烤poblano辣椒代替生jalapeños，增添深度和精致的炭烤风味。
ingredients: 500 g Processed Cheese | 400 g Canned Diced Tomatoes | 3 whole Jalapeños | 0.5 whole Onion | 2 cloves Garlic | 1 tsp Smoked Paprika | 1 tsp Cumin | 15 g Coriander | 200 g Tortilla Chips
instructions: 将jalapeños、onion和garlic切丁。 | 将cheese切块，放入铸铁skillet中。 | 加入tomatoes、jalapeños、onion、garlic、paprika和cumin。 | 在175°C下烟熏25分钟，中途搅拌一次。(25 min) | 撒上coriander，立即搭配tortilla chips上桌。

name: 烟熏羊肩肉
description: 缓慢烟熏的羊肩肉，涂抹哈里萨辣酱，上桌时手撕享用。
pro_tip: 确保羊肉内部温度达到93°C，以获得顶级入口即化的质感。
ingredients: 2 kg Lamb Shoulder | 3 tbsp Harissa | 3 tbsp Olive Oil | 6 cloves Garlic | 2 tsp Cumin | 2 tsp Coriander | 4 sprigs Rosemary | 2 whole Lemon | 8 whole Flatbreads | 200 g Tzatziki
instructions: 在lamb上深度划刀，将harissa、oil、garlic、cumin和coriander混合均匀。 | 将腌料压入切口中，静置过夜。(480 min) | 使用rosemary wood chips在120°C下烟熏6小时。(360 min) | 用锡纸包裹静置30分钟。(30 min) | 上桌时手撕，搭配flatbreads、tzatziki和lemon享用。
